  non_authorized_items:
  - CR102 CP5 已 approved；本批准只接受 CP5 design-only 设计包和 PASS_WITH_RISK 风险接受，不授权真实 NAS access/list/read/write/copy/publish/pull/delete/check/mount，不授权读取凭据/env/账户，不授权 QMT/MiniQMT/XtQuant/gateway runtime，不授权 submit/cancel/simulation/live，不授权 provider/lake/catalog publish。
  - CR101 CP2 已 approved；approve 只接受 scope / architecture / implementation / runtime_authorization / risk_acceptance 推荐方案，不授权 NAS、.env/credential/account、QMT/MiniQMT/XtQuant/gateway runtime、submit/cancel、simulation/live、provider/lake/catalog publish 或 CR089 auto-start。
  - CR046 CP8 已 approved 并关闭当前 READY_WITH_RISK；approve 只接受 framework-first 文档 / 契约交付和 R-CR046-CP7-001..003 / REV-CR046-004 风险，不授权 QMT/MiniQMT/XtQuant/gateway、NAS、.env/credential/account、submit/cancel、simulation/live、provider/lake/catalog，也不自动启动 CR089 或 CR091。
  - CR089 CP2/CP3/CP5 已 approved；本批准仅接受策略包 / NAS package exchange / 交易主机本地缓存 / 只读 smoke 边界的推荐方案，不授权 NAS 内容读写列取复制发布、不授权凭据读取、不授权 QMT/MiniQMT/XtQuant/gateway 启动、不授权账户原文查询、不授权 submit/cancel/simulation/live、不恢复 CR020、不激活 CR089、不恢复 CR046 CP7。
  - CR085 已完成只读远端扫描，但尚未批准任何远端写动作；当前不授权 remote add、fetch 到当前仓库、remote set-url/remove、set-upstream、git push、git push -u、force push、tag、default branch governance、history rewrite、远端删除、dirty worktree commit、external process Git/NAS、data/reports、凭据、NAS 内容、provider/lake/catalog、runtime、CR046 recovery、old root retirement、backup 删除或 cleanup。
  - CR084 CP2/CP3/CP5 已 approved，但后续用户要求远端同步 / 清理，普通 push 路线已暂停并转由 CR085 承接；CR084 不再直接执行 remote add、set-upstream 或 push。
  - CR083 CP2/CP3/CP5 已 approved 且 read-only local Git preflight 已执行；当前仓库无 remote、当前分支无 upstream。CR083 不授权 git push、fetch、ls-remote、remote add/set-url/delete、set-upstream、default branch、tag、force/history rewrite、external process Git/NAS、data/reports、凭据、NAS 内容、runtime、CR046 recovery、old root retirement、backup 删除或 cleanup。
  - CR078 CP2/CP3/CP5 已 approved；仅授权一次 allowlist git add 和一次本地 git commit，不授权 git push、remote URL/default branch/tag/force/history rewrite、external process Git/NAS governance、data/reports、凭据、NAS 内容、runtime、CR046 recovery、old root retirement、backup 删除或 cleanup。
  - CR082 CP8 已 approved 并关闭当前 READY_WITH_RISK；关闭不授权 Git commit/push、remote governance、NAS 内容、data/reports 内容、凭据、runtime、CR046 recovery、old root retirement、backup 删除或 destructive cleanup。
  - CR082 namespace move 已完成并关闭；后续 staged removals 提交、外部 process 项目 Git/NAS 管理、backup 删除或远端发布必须另起 CR / 明确授权。
  - CR082 CP8 已关闭；READY_WITH_RISK 只接受 R-CR082-001..03，不新增 Git、数据、凭据、NAS、runtime 或 cleanup 授权。
  - CR082 namespace move 已完成；后续 staged removals 提交、外部 process 项目 Git/NAS 管理、backup 删除或远端发布仍必须另起 CR / 明确授权。
  - CR082 CP2/CP3/CP5 已 approved 且 namespace move / symlink update / pointer update 已执行；该批准仍不授权 Git commit/push、remote governance、data/reports、凭据、NAS 内容、provider/lake/catalog、runtime、old root retirement、backup 删除或 CR046 recovery。
  - CR082 CP8 待人工确认；approve 仅关闭 READY_WITH_RISK，不新增执行授权。
  - CR081 CP8 已 approved 并关闭当前 READY_WITH_RISK；关闭不授权 Git commit/push、remote governance、NAS 内容、data/reports 内容、凭据、runtime、CR046 recovery、old root retirement、backup 删除或 destructive cleanup。
  - CR081 cutover 已完成；后续 staged removals 提交、外部 process 项目 Git/NAS 管理、backup 删除或远端发布必须另起 CR / 明确授权。
  - CR080 CP8 已 approved；本次 approve 只关闭 READY_WITH_RISK，不授权内容读取、checksum、样本解析、凭据、NAS/provider/lake/catalog、远端 Git、runtime、CR046 recovery、旧根退役或 destructive cleanup。
  - CR080 已完成 target `reports/` / `data/` local copy 并关闭当前交付；后续不授权重复 copy、delete、overwrite、move 或 cleanup。
  - CR091 CP8 已 approved 并关闭当前 READY_WITH_RISK；approve 只接受离线 runner 研究 / 设计 / 实现 / fixture 验证交付和 R-CR091-CP7-001..003 风险，不授权 QMT/MiniQMT/XtQuant/gateway/runner、NAS、.env/credential/account、submit/cancel、simulation/live、provider/lake/catalog，也不自动启动 CR089 或恢复 CR020 gateway 路线。
  - CR079 CP8 已 approved；只关闭 metadata-only inventory 当前交付。
  - CR079 CP8 approve 不授权真实复制、恢复、删除或内容读取。
  - CR076 已关闭为 READY_WITH_RISK；关闭只接受 policy-only / no-data-touch 交付，不授权真实 data/reports 操作。
  - 不读取、打印或迁移 token、密码、cookie、session、private key、账户或交易事实。
  - 不再读取、列出、复制、恢复、比对或删除 reports/、data/；后续任何真实迁移 / 恢复必须另起 CR079-restore-candidate 或等价正式 CR。
  - CR080 已获 CP2/CP3/CP5 approve；post-approval preflight PASS 前仍不执行 reports/data copy、restore、delete、content read 或 credential read。
  - 不执行 provider fetch、lake write、catalog publish 或 MARKET_DATA_LAKE_ROOT replacement。
  - 不执行 git remote add / remote set-url / push / tag / branch rename / default branch governance / history rewrite / force push / remote deletion。
  - 不启动 QMT / MiniQMT runtime、连接、账户查询、下单、撤单、simulation/live。
  - 不删除、重命名或移动旧根 /home/hyde/workspace/local_backtest。
  - 不执行 optional groups、full tests、章节研究 smoke、删除 .venv 或 destructive cleanup。
  - 不恢复或推进 CR046 CP7。
  pending_human_decisions:
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR126-01, gate: CP2, decision_type: scope, question: "是否确认 CR126 从历史文档清理切换到 runner development readiness / runner entry design？", recommendation: "确认切换；历史 docs cleanup 只在直接阻塞 runner 开发时另起小 CR，runner 本体后续集中到 CR127。", alternatives: ["继续清理历史文档后再进入 runner", "跳过入口设计直接进入源码实现"], pros_cons: "推荐方案是最短路径；继续清理会消耗在低收益治理上；跳过入口设计容易把 runtime/source 权限混在一起。", impact_risk: "影响后续工作是否聚焦 runner 开发入口，并把 runner core MVP 收敛到 CR127。", rollback_switch: "若后续发现缺失文档直接阻塞 runner，可另起小范围文档 CR。", status: accepted, answer: "approve; user note: 需要外部权限是我可以授权，你需要完成既定目标", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR126-RUNNER-DEVELOPMENT-READINESS-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR126-02, gate: CP2, decision_type: architecture, question: "runner 入口是否以现有 trading/strategy_runner 离线 package/adapter/evidence 合同为基线？", recommendation: "以现有离线合同为基线；CR127 集中实现 offline runner core，真实 runtime 保持 CR128+ 独立 gate。", alternatives: ["以 QMT runtime collector 为入口", "重新设计全新 runner 包结构"], pros_cons: "推荐方案复用已测试边界且风险最低；runtime collector 会触发 runtime 授权；全新结构周期更长。", impact_risk: "决定 CR127 的技术入口和内部 slice 顺序。", rollback_switch: "若后续离线合同不足，在 CR127 内通过设计 delta 扩展；外部权限域仍走 CR128+。", status: accepted, answer: "approve; user note: 需要外部权限是我可以授权，你需要完成既定目标", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR126-RUNNER-DEVELOPMENT-READINESS-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR126-03, gate: CP2, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP2 是否授权 runtime、NAS、QMT、凭据、provider/lake/catalog 或交易写操作？", recommendation: "不授权；全部冻结为 CR128+ 可选后续 gate，且默认不启动。", alternatives: ["另起 runtime authorization gate", "仅由用户手动回填脱敏 runtime 摘要"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小；备选都需要独立门禁，不应混入本 CR。", impact_risk: "防止入口设计阶段误触外部系统或真实交易边界。", rollback_switch: "任一禁止项必须另起独立 CR 并重新 CP2/CP5。", status: accepted, answer: "approve; future external permission may be requested via independent gate", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR126-RUNNER-DEVELOPMENT-READINESS-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR126-01, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "CP5 approve 后是否允许进入 CR126 CP6 设计材料阶段？", recommendation: "允许，但仅写 process/docs 设计材料；不改源码、不跑测试、不启动 runtime；CP6 输出应直接服务 CR127。", alternatives: ["只保留本次分析，不进入 CP6", "直接启动源码实现 CR"], pros_cons: "推荐方案能补齐实现前入口设计；只分析会停在候选排序；直接实现权限跨度过大。", impact_risk: "影响是否形成可交接的 Runner Core MVP Design / CR127 Scope。", rollback_switch: "若用户拒绝 CP6，则 CR126 停在候选排序；源码实现必须另起 CR127。", status: accepted, answer: "approve; process/docs design only", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR126-RUNNER-ENTRY-DESIGN-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR126-02, gate: CP5, decision_type: architecture, question: "第一批 development slice 是否作为 CR127 内部 slice 按 RDS-01 -> RDS-02 -> RDS-03 排序？", recommendation: "按该顺序推进：contract、orchestration、evidence/CLI/regression；不拆成多个正式 CR。", alternatives: ["优先做 runtime gate", "优先改 CLI/API 源码"], pros_cons: "推荐方案最短且低风险；runtime gate 触发高风险权限；直接改源码缺少入口契约。", impact_risk: "决定 CR127 内部执行顺序，而不是创建多个正式 CR。", rollback_switch: "若 RDS-01 发现现有边界不足，在 CR127 内通过设计 delta 调整；外部权限域仍走 CR128+。", status: accepted, answer: "approve", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR126-RUNNER-ENTRY-DESIGN-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR126-03, gate: CP5, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP5 approve 是否额外授权 runtime、NAS、QMT、凭据、provider/lake/catalog、commit/push 或源码修改？", recommendation: "不授权；这些项继续冻结，CR128+ 仅在用户明确要求外部权限域时启动。", alternatives: ["另起 runtime authorization gate", "另起 CR127 Runner Core MVP Implementation"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小；CR127 只覆盖 offline runner core；runtime gate 应独立审查。", impact_risk: "避免 design gate 被误用为执行授权。", rollback_switch: "任一外部禁止项需要新 CR/CP2/CP5；offline 源码实现需 CR127。", status: accepted, answer: "approve; future external permission may be requested via independent gate", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR126-RUNNER-ENTRY-DESIGN-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR126-01, gate: CP8, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受 CR126 当前 READY 结论并关闭 CR126？", recommendation: "接受并关闭 CR126；将 Runner Core MVP Design / CR127 Scope 作为后续 CR127 输入。", alternatives: ["修改 CR127 scope 后重提 CP8", "reject，保持 CR126 active"], pros_cons: "推荐方案完成当前 design/scope gate；修改适合仍需调整 runner core 范围；reject 会阻断 CR127 启动。", impact_risk: "决定是否可以结束 CR126 并准备用户后续选择 CR127。", rollback_switch: "若用户发现 CR127 范围不对，回到 CP6 修改设计材料后重提 CP8。", status: accepted, answer: "approve", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR126-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR126-02, gate: CP8, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP8 approve 是否授权启动 CR127、源码修改、测试运行、runtime/NAS/QMT/凭据/provider/lake/catalog、commit/push 或交易动作？", recommendation: "不授权；CP8 approve 只关闭 CR126。CR127 需用户后续明确启动；CR128+ 需外部权限独立门禁。", alternatives: ["修改为立即启动 CR127", "修改为先启动 CR128+ 外部权限 gate"], pros_cons: "推荐方案保持门禁最小且可审计；备选都是新工作，不应混入 CR126 关闭。", impact_risk: "防止 READY 被误解为执行、发布或外部授权。", rollback_switch: "用户明确要求启动 CR127 或外部权限时，新起对应 CR。", status: accepted, answer: "approve; no CR127/source/test/runtime/external/git/trading authorization", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR126-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR125-01, gate: CP8, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受 CR125 当前 READY_WITH_RISK 结论？", recommendation: "接受：CR102 三个设计型残留已删除，CR103/CR104 重点文档保留，CR121 已 superseded-by-CR125。", alternatives: ["回到 CP6 恢复 CR102 文件", "保持 CR125 active 等待 commit/push gate", "reject 并恢复 CR121 单独 cleanup"], pros_cons: "推荐方案最短路径结束文档治理；备选会恢复入口噪音或继续拖延 runner development。", impact_risk: "本地文档变更未发布；CR121 index-only cleanup 不再执行。", rollback_switch: "若用户不接受风险，则保持 CR125 active 并指定回退项。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T13:34:51+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR125-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T13:34:51+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR125-02, gate: CP8, decision_type: follow_up_tracking, question: "是否确认停止横向历史 docs cleanup，下一步转入 runner development？", recommendation: "确认：关闭 CR125 后停止继续清理历史文档，仅处理 runner 开发直接阻塞。", alternatives: ["继续下一轮 docs cleanup", "另起 CR121 index cleanup", "另起 docs publication gate"], pros_cons: "推荐方案与最短路径一致；继续清理会延后开发；publication gate 可后置。", impact_risk: "决定是否恢复 quant-lab 后续开发节奏。", rollback_switch: "若 runner 开发中出现具体文档阻塞，再开小 CR。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T13:34:51+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR125-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T13:34:51+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR125-03, gate: CP8, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP8 approve 是否授权 push、runtime、NAS/QMT、source/checker/tests、`.gitignore` 或 `git rm --cached`？", recommendation: "不授权；CP8 只关闭 CR125 当前文档治理交付。", alternatives: ["另起 push/publication gate", "另起 runner implementation CR", "另起 runtime authorization gate"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小；备选均需独立门禁。", impact_risk: "防止 READY_WITH_RISK 被误解为发布、实现或外部运行授权。", rollback_switch: "任一禁止项必须另起独立 CR。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T13:34:51+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR125-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T13:34:51+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR125-01, gate: CP2, decision_type: scope, question: "是否接受 CR125 为 runner development 前最后一个文档治理门禁？", recommendation: "接受，仅覆盖 CR121 剩余结论与 CR102/103/104 五个文件处理决策。", alternatives: ["只做 CR102/103/104", "只做 CR121", "暂停，直接进入开发"], pros_cons: "推荐方案防止目录治理遗留继续影响开发入口；单边处理会遗漏另一侧；直接开发最快但风险未收口。", impact_risk: "影响进入 runner development 前是否还保留目录治理不确定性。", rollback_switch: "若用户选择暂停，则 CR125 关闭为 deferred，不执行 cleanup。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T12:43:37+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR125-RUNNER-DEVELOPMENT-READINESS-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T13:34:51+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR125-02, gate: CP2, decision_type: scope, question: "是否冻结历史 docs cleanup 停止线？", recommendation: "冻结：本 CR 后停止继续横向清理历史文档，后续只处理 runner 开发直接需要的文档。", alternatives: ["继续全量 docs 清理", "完全停止不处理 CR102/103/104", "转 spike"], pros_cons: "推荐方案最短路径回到开发；全量清理会继续拖延；完全停止可能留下入口混乱。", impact_risk: "决定后续是否继续消耗周期在历史文档治理。", rollback_switch: "若 runner 开发中发现具体文档阻塞，再开小 CR。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T12:43:37+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR125-RUNNER-DEVELOPMENT-READINESS-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T13:34:51+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR125-03, gate: CP2, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "是否继续禁止 push、runtime、NAS、credentials、source/checker/tests、`.gitignore`？", recommendation: "继续禁止；当前只允许 process 门禁与 read-only audit。", alternatives: ["另起 push gate", "另起 runtime gate", "另起 checker/source CR"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小；备选均不属于当前 readiness scope。", impact_risk: "防止文档治理门禁扩大为实现或外部运行授权。", rollback_switch: "任一禁止项必须另起独立门禁。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T12:43:37+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR125-RUNNER-DEVELOPMENT-READINESS-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T13:34:51+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR125-01, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "后续 CP6 是否可执行最小文档整改？", recommendation: "仅在 CP5 approve 后允许对 CP5 列出的最小 docs/features 子集做删除/迁移/压缩；默认先不动。", alternatives: ["只输出建议不改文件", "直接删除 5 个文件", "全部保留"], pros_cons: "推荐方案保留执行能力但避免误删；只建议更保守但可能无法收口；直接删除风险过高；全部保留可能留下混乱。", impact_risk: "影响 CR102/103/104 文档是否继续占据开发入口。", rollback_switch: "若逐项复盘发现都是证据，则全部保留或迁移，不删除。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T12:43:37+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR125-RUNNER-DEVELOPMENT-READINESS-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T13:34:51+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR125-02, gate: CP5, decision_type: follow_up_tracking, question: "CR121 如何处理？", recommendation: "将 CR121 剩余 cleanup 纳入 CR125 的最小 readiness 判断；若无需执行则标记 superseded/deferred。", alternatives: ["恢复 CR121 单独执行", "关闭 CR121 为 superseded", "保持 blocked"], pros_cons: "推荐方案减少门禁数量；恢复 CR121 增加轮次；直接 superseded 需确认无剩余动作；保持 blocked 保留噪音。", impact_risk: "影响 CR tracking 是否继续显示 CR121 blocker。", rollback_switch: "若发现 CR121 仍需真实 index cleanup，则回 CP5 明确授权。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T12:43:37+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR125-RUNNER-DEVELOPMENT-READINESS-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T13:34:51+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR125-03, gate: CP5, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP5 approve 是否授权 runtime、push、source/checker/tests？", recommendation: "不授权；只允许后续 CP6 最小文档整改。", alternatives: ["另起 runner implementation CR", "另起 runtime gate", "另起 push gate"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小；备选均应独立门禁。", impact_risk: "防止 cleanup gate 被误解为开发或运行授权。", rollback_switch: "任一禁止项必须另起独立 CR。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T12:43:37+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR125-RUNNER-DEVELOPMENT-READINESS-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T13:34:51+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR124-01, gate: CP8, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受 CR124 当前 READY_WITH_RISK 结论？", recommendation: "接受：artifact repo local commit `144a7b3` 已完成，关闭 CR124 当前交付。", alternatives: ["回到 CP6 重做 artifact commit", "暂不关闭，等待 push gate", "reject 并要求恢复 feature docs 删除"], pros_cons: "推荐方案最快收敛当前本地交付；重做会返工；等待 push gate 会扩大本 CR；reject 会撤销已批准 cleanup。", impact_risk: "commit 仅本地，未 push。", rollback_switch: "若不接受 local-only 风险，保持 CR124 active 并另起 push/rollback gate。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T12:06:50+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR124-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T13:34:51+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR124-02, gate: CP8, decision_type: follow_up_tracking, question: "CR121 与 CR102/103/104 后续如何处理？", recommendation: "保持 `FU-CR124-001`：并入后续 runner development 相关 CR 处理。", alternatives: ["立即启动独立 CR121 cleanup", "立即启动 CR102/103/104 review", "暂停跟踪"], pros_cons: "推荐方案符合用户要求；立即启动会增加当前收尾轮次；暂停跟踪会丢失上下文。", impact_risk: "影响恢复 quant-lab 开发前最后的文档治理顺序。", rollback_switch: "用户明确要求时再从 follow-up 台账转正式 CR。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T12:06:50+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR124-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T13:34:51+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR124-03, gate: CP8, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP8 approve 是否授权 push、runtime、CR121 cleanup、source/checker/tests 或 `.gitignore` 修改？", recommendation: "不授权；CP8 只关闭 CR124 当前本地 artifact commit。", alternatives: ["另起 artifact push gate", "另起 CR121 cleanup gate", "另起 runner cleanup implementation gate"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小；备选均需独立门禁和范围确认。", impact_risk: "防止 READY_WITH_RISK 被误解为远端发布或源码整改授权。", rollback_switch: "任一禁止项必须新建或恢复对应 gate。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T12:06:50+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR124-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T13:34:51+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR124-01, gate: CP2, decision_type: scope, question: "是否确认 CR124 仅覆盖 artifact repo 中 31 个 feature docs 删除项？", recommendation: "确认，仅允许这 31 个 deletion entries 进入后续 CP6 artifact commit。", alternatives: ["暂停 publication", "回到 CR123 恢复 feature docs", "合并 CR121"], pros_cons: "推荐方案最小化发布范围；暂停会保留 artifact dirty；恢复会撤销整改；合并 CR121 会扩大治理范围。", impact_risk: "后续 CP6 只能处理 allowlist；若 deletion set 改变必须回 CP2/CP5。", rollback_switch: "发现 deletion entries 不是 31 个或包含 CR102/103/104 时停止。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T11:53:48+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR124-ARTIFACT-FEATURE-DOCS-CLEANUP-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T11:53:48+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR124-02, gate: CP2, decision_type: scope, question: "CR121 与 CR102/103/104 详细清理如何处理？", recommendation: "写入后续 runner 开发相关 CR，不在 CR124 执行。", alternatives: ["立即启动单独 review CR", "纳入 CR124", "暂停记录"], pros_cons: "推荐方案保持 CR124 可快速收口；单独 review 会增加轮次；纳入 CR124 会扩大范围；暂停记录追踪弱。", impact_risk: "影响后续 runner 开发前文档治理路线。", rollback_switch: "用户要求立即处理时另起独立 runner cleanup CR。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T11:53:48+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR124-ARTIFACT-FEATURE-DOCS-CLEANUP-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T11:53:48+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR124-03, gate: CP2, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "是否继续禁止 push、runtime、source/checker/tests、CR121 cleanup？", recommendation: "继续禁止；本 CR 不授权这些动作。", alternatives: ["另起 push gate", "另起 CR121 resume", "另起 runner cleanup CR"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小；备选均需独立门禁。", impact_risk: "防止 artifact commit gate 被误解为远端发布或治理总清理。", rollback_switch: "任一禁止项需求必须新建或恢复对应 gate。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T11:53:48+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR124-ARTIFACT-FEATURE-DOCS-CLEANUP-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T11:53:48+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR124-01, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "后续 CP6 是否可执行 artifact repo local commit？", recommendation: "授权 CP6 只 stage/commit 31 个 allowlisted feature docs 删除项。", alternatives: ["不提交，仅保持 dirty", "要求先提交全部 process artifacts", "分目录 commit"], pros_cons: "推荐方案固化 cleanup 且不混入 process artifacts；保持 dirty 会保留风险；提交全部 process artifacts 越界；分目录 commit 增加复杂度。", impact_risk: "会写 artifact repo 本地 Git 历史，但不写远端。", rollback_switch: "CP6 前任何非 allowlist staged 文件出现时停止。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T11:53:48+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR124-ARTIFACT-FEATURE-DOCS-CLEANUP-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T11:53:48+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR124-02, gate: CP5, decision_type: security, question: "artifact repo dirty allowlist 如何冻结？", recommendation: "允许 process artifacts dirty 保持未提交；若 CP6 stage 中出现非 31 allowlist 路径则停止。", alternatives: ["要求 artifact repo 全干净", "把 process artifacts 一并提交", "暂停"], pros_cons: "推荐方案避免混合运行态文件和 feature docs cleanup；全干净会阻塞；提交 process artifacts 越界；暂停不解决 dirty。", impact_risk: "依赖 CP6 前重跑 staged list 检查。", rollback_switch: "process artifacts 被 stage 或 allowlist 改变时回 CP5。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T11:53:48+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR124-ARTIFACT-FEATURE-DOCS-CLEANUP-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T11:53:48+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR124-03, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "artifact commit message 如何冻结？", recommendation: "使用 `CR124: publish artifact feature docs cleanup`。", alternatives: ["Publish CR123 artifact feature cleanup", "CR123 feature docs cleanup", "CP6 前再确认"], pros_cons: "推荐方案可追溯 CR124；备选 message 也可行但追溯弱。", impact_risk: "message 不影响内容，但影响审计。", rollback_switch: "用户修改 message 时只更新 CP5 决策。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T11:53:48+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR124-ARTIFACT-FEATURE-DOCS-CLEANUP-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T11:53:48+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR124-04, gate: CP5, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP5 approve 是否授权 push 或外部系统？", recommendation: "不授权；只允许 future CP6 local artifact commit。", alternatives: ["另起 artifact push gate", "另起 runtime gate", "暂停"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小；artifact push 与 runtime 均超出当前目标。", impact_risk: "防止 local commit 被误解为远端发布。", rollback_switch: "任何 push/runtime 需求必须另起 gate。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T11:53:48+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR124-ARTIFACT-FEATURE-DOCS-CLEANUP-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T11:53:48+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR123-01, gate: CP8, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受 CR123 当前交付结论？", recommendation: "接受 READY_WITH_RISK：主仓库 29 docs 已本地 commit，artifact 7 个非重点 feature CR 目录已本地删除，CR102/103/104 已保留。", alternatives: ["回到 CP6 重做 cleanup", "暂不关闭，等待 artifact commit gate", "reject 并要求恢复 artifact 删除"], pros_cons: "推荐方案关闭当前本地整改；重做会返工；等待 artifact commit gate 会延后关闭；reject 会撤销已批准 cleanup。", impact_risk: "artifact deletion 尚未 artifact commit/push。", rollback_switch: "若不接受 local artifact dirty 风险，则不要关闭 CR123，转入 artifact publication / rollback gate。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T11:41:53+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR123-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T11:41:53+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR123-02, gate: CP8, decision_type: follow_up_tracking, question: "CR123 关闭后如何处理残余事项？", recommendation: "记录两个后续候选：artifact repo deletion publication gate；CR102/103/CR104 priority review gate。", alternatives: ["立即启动 artifact publication gate", "立即启动 CR102/103/104 review", "暂停"], pros_cons: "推荐方案不自动串联新高风险动作；artifact publication 和 priority review 可更快收敛但需独立门禁。", impact_risk: "影响后续是否提交 artifact 删除和处理重点目录。", rollback_switch: "用户明确选择下一 CR 时再启动。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T11:41:53+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR123-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T11:41:53+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR123-03, gate: CP8, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP8 approve 是否授权 push、remote write、runtime、CR121 cleanup 或源码/checker/tests 修改？", recommendation: "不授权；CP8 只关闭 CR123 当前本地交付。", alternatives: ["另起 push/publication gate", "另起 CR121 resume", "另起 checker/tests CR"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小；备选均需独立门禁。", impact_risk: "防止 READY_WITH_RISK 被误解为远端发布或其他 cleanup 授权。", rollback_switch: "任一禁止项必须新建或恢复对应 gate。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T11:41:53+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR123-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T11:41:53+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR123-01, gate: CP2, decision_type: scope, question: "是否确认 CR123 仅覆盖 CR122 的 29 个 staged docs 变更？", recommendation: "确认，仅允许这 29 个 docs 路径进入后续 CP6 local commit。", alternatives: ["暂停 publication", "回到 CR122 重新恢复", "改为 CR121 cleanup 优先"], pros_cons: "推荐方案最小化发布范围；暂停会保留 staged 风险；重做 CR122 会返工；CR121 优先会混淆内容发布与 index cleanup。", impact_risk: "后续 CP6 只能提交 allowlist；若 allowlist 变化必须回 CP2/CP5。", rollback_switch: "发现 staged 路径不是 29 个或包含非 docs 时停止并重提 CP2。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR123-STAGED-DOCS-PUBLICATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR123-02, gate: CP2, decision_type: implementation, question: "是否接受 CP2/CP5 当前只做预检，不立即提交？", recommendation: "接受 staged route：本轮不 commit；CP5 approve 后 CP6 才能 local commit。", alternatives: ["design-only 不进入 CP5", "直接取消 CR123", "拆成 CP2 后另起 CP5"], pros_cons: "推荐方案保持门禁完整；design-only 不解决 staged 风险；取消会停止发布；拆分会增加轮次。", impact_risk: "当前不会写 Git 历史；后续 CP6 必须重新预检。", rollback_switch: "用户要求立即提交时，仍需先 approve CP5。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR123-STAGED-DOCS-PUBLICATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR123-03, gate: CP2, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "是否继续禁止 push、runtime、.gitignore、source/checker/tests 和 CR121 cleanup？", recommendation: "继续禁止；本 CR 不授权这些动作。", alternatives: ["另起 push gate", "另起 CR121 resume", "另起 checker/.gitignore CR"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小；备选均应独立门禁。", impact_risk: "防止 local commit gate 被误解为远端发布或其他 cleanup 授权。", rollback_switch: "任一禁止项需求必须新建或恢复对应 gate。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR123-STAGED-DOCS-PUBLICATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR123-04, gate: CP2, decision_type: scope, question: "是否把 docs/features CRxxx artifact directory 纳入 CR123 一起整改？", recommendation: "纳入同一 CR，但拆成 CP6-B artifact docs/features cleanup：7 个非重点 CRxxx 目录作为删除候选，CR102/103/104 三个目录作为重点处理对象。", alternatives: ["另起 CR124 单独处理 docs/features", "只记录不整改", "把 docs/features 并入 CR121 cleanup"], pros_cons: "推荐方案响应当前范围变更且保持执行切片清晰；另起 CR 会增加轮次；只记录不整改；并入 CR121 会混淆 index-only cleanup 与内容删除。", impact_risk: "会新增 artifact repo 文档删除候选，但本轮不删除；CP5/CP6 必须冻结 allowlist。", rollback_switch: "若发现重点目录内有未同步证据或用户要求逐文件保留，则 CP6-B 停止并回 CP5 修订。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR123-STAGED-DOCS-PUBLICATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR123-01, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "后续 CP6 是否可执行 local git commit？", recommendation: "授权 CP6 只在 index 精确等于 29 个 allowlisted docs 路径且无额外 staged 文件时执行一次 local commit。", alternatives: ["不提交，仅保持 staged", "要求先清理其他 dirty 文件", "分两次 commit"], pros_cons: "推荐方案可固化 CR122 结果；保持 staged 会保留风险；清理其他 dirty 文件会阻塞无关工作；分两次 commit 增加审计复杂度。", impact_risk: "会写本地 Git 历史，但不写远端。", rollback_switch: "CP6 前任何 staged 非 allowlist 文件出现时停止。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR123-STAGED-DOCS-PUBLICATION-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR123-02, gate: CP5, decision_type: security, question: "dirty worktree allowlist 如何冻结？", recommendation: "允许既有 excluded dirty 文件保留未暂存 / 未跟踪，但若它们进入 index 或新增 staged 非 allowlist 文件，CP6 必须停止。", alternatives: ["要求工作区完全干净后再 commit", "把 CR118/CR119 文件也纳入 commit", "暂停"], pros_cons: "推荐方案风险可控且不破坏既有工作；工作区全干净成本高；纳入其他文件会越界；暂停不解决 staged docs。", impact_risk: "依赖 CP6 前重新检查 index。", rollback_switch: "excluded 文件被 staged 或 allowlist 改变时回 CP5。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR123-STAGED-DOCS-PUBLICATION-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR123-03, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "local commit message 如何冻结？", recommendation: "使用 `CR123: publish CR122 staged docs restore`。", alternatives: ["Publish CR122 docs baseline restore", "CR122 docs baseline restore", "CP6 前再确认 message"], pros_cons: "推荐方案可追溯 CR123 与 CR122；备选 message 也可行但追溯弱。", impact_risk: "message 不影响内容，但影响审计。", rollback_switch: "用户修改 message 时只更新 CP5 决策，不改内容范围。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR123-STAGED-DOCS-PUBLICATION-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR123-04, gate: CP5, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP5 approve 是否授权 push、remote write、runtime 或外部系统？", recommendation: "不授权；只允许未来 CP6 local commit。", alternatives: ["另起 remote publication gate", "另起 runtime gate", "暂停"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小；remote publication 与 runtime 均超出当前目标。", impact_risk: "防止 local commit 被误解为远端发布。", rollback_switch: "任何 push/runtime 需求必须另起 gate。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR123-STAGED-DOCS-PUBLICATION-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR123-05, gate: CP5, decision_type: follow_up_tracking, question: "CP6 local commit 后如何收敛？", recommendation: "CP6 后做静态验证并进入 CP8；CR121 仍等待用户另行选择。", alternatives: ["CP6 后立即恢复 CR121", "CP6 后启动 push gate", "CP6 后暂停"], pros_cons: "推荐方案先关闭本 CR；CR121 和 push gate 影响面不同，需单独选择。", impact_risk: "避免自动串联 CR121 或 push。", rollback_switch: "用户明确选择后再启动相应 gate。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR123-STAGED-DOCS-PUBLICATION-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR123-06, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "后续 CP6-B 是否可删除非重点 docs/features CRxxx 目录？", recommendation: "授权 CP6-B 仅在 artifact repo 前置检查通过时删除 7 个 allowlisted 目录：CR093-ledger-hygiene、CR094-warning-cleanup、CR095-standalone-checker-cli-output-convergence、cr045-goldminer-bridge、cr061-package-import-layout、cr098-runner-readonly-integration、cr099-runner-real-readonly-smoke。", alternatives: ["另起 CR124 删除", "只删除空目录或无 VERIFICATION 的目录", "暂不删除仅记录"], pros_cons: "推荐方案符合用户其他文本基本可以直接删除；另起 CR 增加轮次；只删部分会留下历史 CR 文档残余；只记录不整改。", impact_risk: "会删除 artifact repo 中已跟踪文档内容；CP6-B 前必须重跑 allowlist，且不影响主仓库 29 个 staged docs commit。", rollback_switch: "任一目录清单不匹配、出现未审查修改或用户要求保留时停止并回 CP5。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR123-STAGED-DOCS-PUBLICATION-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR123-07, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "CR102/CR103/CR104 三个 docs/features 目录如何重点处理？", recommendation: "默认保留并进入重点审查：CR102 的 DESIGN/TASKS/TEST-PLAN、CR103 的 VERIFICATION、CR104 的 INPUT-CHECKLIST 不在 CP6-B 默认删除范围；后续只做内容复盘/必要压缩或迁移建议。", alternatives: ["三个目录全部保留不处理", "只保留 CR103/CR104 验证记录，删除 CR102 设计文档", "三个目录另起 CR 单独逐文件处理"], pros_cons: "推荐方案避免误删 CR102/103/104 验证链；全部保留不处理不能完成重点处理；只保留 CR103/CR104 可能提前删除授权设计上下文；另起 CR 更保守但增加轮次。", impact_risk: "保留这些文件会留下少量 artifact docs，但可防止误删近期验证与授权证据。", rollback_switch: "审查发现某文件只是重复设计残余时，另行更新 allowlist 后再删除。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR123-STAGED-DOCS-PUBLICATION-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR123-08, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "CR123 后续执行顺序如何冻结？", recommendation: "拆成两个 CP6 切片：先 CP6-A 处理主仓库 29 个 staged docs local commit；再 CP6-B 处理 artifact repo docs/features cleanup；两者均不 push。", alternatives: ["先删 feature 再 commit docs", "两个 repo 混在一个 commit/步骤", "只做 CP6-A 暂停 CP6-B"], pros_cons: "推荐方案让主仓库发布与 artifact 删除分别可验证；先删 feature 会让 staged 风险继续悬挂；混合步骤难审计；只做 CP6-A 不完成用户新增整改。", impact_risk: "需要在 CP6-B 后另行处理 artifact repo 的本地变更状态；不自动 push。", rollback_switch: "任一切片前置检查失败则停止，不继续下一切片。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR123-STAGED-DOCS-PUBLICATION-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T11:21:01+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR122-01, gate: CP8, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受 CR122 当前本地交付结论？", recommendation: "接受 READY_WITH_RISK：docs-only restore 已执行并验证，staged docs tree 等于 precheck baseline；风险是本地 staged changes 尚未 commit/push。", alternatives: ["回到 CP6 重新恢复", "暂不关闭，等待 publication gate", "reject 并要求回滚本地 docs restore"], pros_cons: "推荐方案完成本 CR 本地目标；备选会增加返工、混入发布治理或撤销整改。", impact_risk: "关闭 CR122 不等于发布；后续提交/推送另起 gate。", rollback_switch: "若用户不接受 staged 风险，则不关闭并另起 publication/rollback 决策。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T10:22:20+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR122-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T10:22:20+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR122-02, gate: CP8, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP8 approve 是否授权 commit、push、remote write、.gitignore、source/checker/tests、CR121 cleanup 或 runtime？", recommendation: "不授权；CP8 只关闭 CR122 本地 docs-only restore。", alternatives: ["另起 publication gate", "另起 CR121 resume gate", "另起 checker/.gitignore hardening gate"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小；备选均需独立门禁。", impact_risk: "防止 READY_WITH_RISK 被误解为发布或其他 cleanup 授权。", rollback_switch: "任一禁止项需要新 CR / gate。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T10:22:20+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR122-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T10:22:20+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR122-03, gate: CP8, decision_type: follow_up_tracking, question: "CR122 关闭后下一步如何处理？", recommendation: "记录后续候选：优先 publication gate 或恢复 CR121 CP6 index-only cleanup 二选一，由用户下一步明确选择。", alternatives: ["立即启动 publication gate", "立即恢复 CR121 CP6", "暂停"], pros_cons: "推荐方案不自动启动新工作；A/B 都有价值但影响面不同；暂停最保守。", impact_risk: "影响后续是否提交 staged docs changes 或继续目录 index cleanup。", rollback_switch: "用户明确选择后再启动对应 CR / gate。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T10:22:20+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR122-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T10:22:20+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR122-01, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "是否授权后续 CP6 执行 docs-only 内容恢复？", recommendation: "授权 CP6 仅对 CR122 context 中列出的 29 个 docs 目标执行内容恢复：28 个 merge-restored 新增 docs 默认恢复为不存在，docs/USER-MANUAL.md 恢复 precheck 基线版本。", alternatives: ["只恢复 docs/USER-MANUAL.md", "只恢复 docs/qmt 与 docs/goldminer", "design-only，不执行恢复"], pros_cons: "推荐方案完整覆盖用户目标；只恢复部分路径会保留 merge 回流；design-only 不修复。", impact_risk: "CP6 会产生 docs 工作区 / index 变更；提交 / 推送仍需独立授权。", rollback_switch: "若 CP6 前路径清单变化，停止并回 CP5 修订。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T10:15:47+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR122-MERGE-RESTORED-DOCS-REVERSION-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T10:15:47+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR122-02, gate: CP5, decision_type: scope, question: "CR102/103/104 验证记录 / 结果如何保留？", recommendation: "保留规则而非预置路径：CP6 前重扫 work 分支和 process evidence；只保留被确认是 CR102/103/104 验证记录 / 验证结果的 docs 路径。当前 confirmed docs 保留路径为空，CR102 HLD 默认不保留。", alternatives: ["保留所有 CR102/103/104 命名文件", "保留 docs/qmt/CR102-NAS-REAL-PACKAGE-EXCHANGE-AUTHORIZATION-HLD.md", "不保留任何 work 分支 docs"], pros_cons: "推荐方案符合用户限定；保留所有命名文件或 CR102 HLD 会保留设计/HLD；不保留任何路径可能误删真实验证证据。", impact_risk: "CP6 前若发现真实验证结果路径，会缩小删除集合。", rollback_switch: "用户提供具体验证记录路径时，更新 allowlist 后再 CP6。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T10:15:47+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR122-MERGE-RESTORED-DOCS-REVERSION-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T10:15:47+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR122-03, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "后续 CR 对原基线 docs 的合法修改如何处理？", recommendation: "CP6 前必须重跑 git log 234b3d3..HEAD -- docs 和工作区 diff 检查；若存在后续合法 CR 修改，则保留修改后的内容，不机械覆盖。", alternatives: ["忽略后续修改，严格回到 precheck 基线", "对所有当前 docs 保守保留", "暂停等待人工逐文件确认"], pros_cons: "推荐方案兼顾恢复和不覆盖合法变更；严格回基线可能丢修改；全部保留会保留 merge 回流；逐文件确认成本高。", impact_risk: "需要 CP6 前再做一次只读预检。", rollback_switch: "发现不确定修改时暂停 CP6 并重提 CP5。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T10:15:47+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR122-MERGE-RESTORED-DOCS-REVERSION-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T10:15:47+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR122-04, gate: CP5, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受 CP6 后只留下本地 docs 工作区 / index 变更，不自动提交 / 推送？", recommendation: "接受：CP6 只做本地 docs 内容恢复和验证；不执行 commit、push、remote write、branch/tag/history 操作。", alternatives: ["CP6 后立即另起 publication gate", "本轮不执行 CP6", "把恢复和 commit 合并到一个高风险门禁"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小；publication gate 需另审；不执行不修复；合并 commit 范围过大。", impact_risk: "本地变更需要后续发布治理。", rollback_switch: "若不能接受 dirty worktree，选择不执行 CP6 或先设计 publication gate。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T10:15:47+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR122-MERGE-RESTORED-DOCS-REVERSION-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T10:15:47+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR122-05, gate: CP5, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP5 approve 是否授权 .gitignore、source/checker/tests、CR121 index cleanup、runtime/NAS/credentials/trading/provider/lake/catalog/publish？", recommendation: "不授权；CP5 只授权后续 CP6 docs-only 内容恢复。CR121 index-only cleanup 保持 separate/deferred。", alternatives: ["同时授权 CR121 CP6", "同时授权 .gitignore 或 checker hardening", "同时授权 commit/push"], pros_cons: "推荐方案保持边界清晰；备选都会扩大到其他 CR 或高风险发布治理。", impact_risk: "防止 CP5 被误读为源码、索引清理、外部运行或发布授权。", rollback_switch: "任一禁止项都必须另起或重开对应 CR / gate。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T10:15:47+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR122-MERGE-RESTORED-DOCS-REVERSION-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T10:15:47+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR122-01, gate: CP2, decision_type: scope, question: "是否接受 precheck/ql-rd-000-redesign-baseline 的 pre-merge docs 作为 CR122 主恢复基线？", recommendation: "接受：以 234b3d3^1 / 47a5eee6ad601ee13e1a193eb86116430ab498bc 上的 precheck docs 为主基线，而不是 work 分支或当前 merge 结果。", alternatives: ["仅恢复 docs/USER-MANUAL.md", "仅登记差异不恢复", "逐文件人工判定 docs/qmt/docs/release"], pros_cons: "推荐方案符合用户修正后的目标且边界清楚；只恢复 USER-MANUAL 会保留主线回流文档；只登记不修复；逐文件人工判定会增加门禁轮次。", impact_risk: "后续 CP6 将产生 docs 内容/存在性变化，提交/推送仍需独立授权。", rollback_switch: "若用户修改基线或路径清单，回到 CP2 更新目标清单；若不接受，CR122 标记 rejected/cancelled。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T10:07:48+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR122-MERGE-RESTORED-DOCS-REVERSION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T10:07:48+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR122-02, gate: CP2, decision_type: scope, question: "是否确认 CR122 仅处理 merge-restored docs 内容恢复，不处理 CR121 的 index-only remediation？", recommendation: "确认：CR122 只覆盖 git diff 234b3d3^1..234b3d3 -- docs 中列出的 28 个新增 docs 和 1 个修改 docs/USER-MANUAL.md；CR121 的 docs/design、docs/features、docs/quality、process、checkpoints、.claude/** index-only cleanup 保持 separate/not-executed。", alternatives: ["合并 CR121 CP6 与 CR122 CP6", "只做 CR121 index cleanup", "把 docs/release 排除"], pros_cons: "推荐方案避免把内容恢复与 index cleanup 混在一个授权里；合并会放大风险；只做 CR121 不解决 merge-restored docs；排除 docs/release 会偏离用户目标。", impact_risk: "需要在后续 CP5/CP6 明确执行顺序，避免同一轮混用 git rm/delete/restore。", rollback_switch: "若用户要求合并执行，必须重开 CP5 并重新打印授权清单。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T10:07:48+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR122-MERGE-RESTORED-DOCS-REVERSION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T10:07:48+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR122-03, gate: CP2, decision_type: implementation, question: "是否接受后续 staged route：CP2 仅范围确认和冲突预检，CP5 approve 后才授权 CP6 docs 内容恢复？", recommendation: "接受 staged route；CP2 不执行恢复。若后续 CP5 approve，则 CP6 仅对本 CR 列出的 docs 目标执行：新增文档默认恢复为不存在，docs/USER-MANUAL.md 恢复为 precheck 基线版本；但必须保留已确认的 CR102/103/104 验证记录 / 验证结果和后续合法 CR 修改。", alternatives: ["CP2 后立即恢复", "CP5 仅授权 USER-MANUAL", "先做更宽 merge audit"], pros_cons: "推荐方案符合当前授权边界且保留验证证据例外；立即恢复越过 CP5；只恢复 USER-MANUAL 不完整；更宽 audit 会延后当前目标。", impact_risk: "CP5 前不会产生 docs 目标 diff；CP6 后可能出现删除类工作区状态但不自动 git rm/commit/push。", rollback_switch: "CP5 前发现路径清单错误或用户提供具体验证证据路径则修订 CR122；CP6 前发现冲突则以 precheck 基线加保留例外为准并记录。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T10:07:48+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR122-MERGE-RESTORED-DOCS-REVERSION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T10:07:48+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR122-04, gate: CP2, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP2 approve 是否授权删除、git rm、git restore、.gitignore、源码/checker/tests、commit/push 或 runtime？", recommendation: "不授权；CP2 只允许 process 产物和静态检查。继续禁止删除/移动、git rm、git restore、.gitignore 修改、源码/checker/tests 修改、git add/commit/push/remote write、checkout/reset/clean、runtime/NAS/凭据/交易/provider/lake/catalog/publish。", alternatives: ["CP5 授权后允许 docs-only restore", "另起 publication gate", "另起 checker hardening CR"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小；docs-only restore 需 CP5；publication 和 checker 都应独立门禁。", impact_risk: "防止把 CP2 scope approval 误解为执行授权。", rollback_switch: "任何禁止项需求必须新建或重开对应高风险 gate。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T10:07:48+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR122-MERGE-RESTORED-DOCS-REVERSION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T10:07:48+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR121-01, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "是否授权后续 CP6 执行最小 index-only remediation 子集？", recommendation: "授权仅对 docs/design、docs/features、docs/quality、process、checkpoints、.claude/** 执行 index-only untrack；不删除工作区文件和 symlink 目标。", alternatives: ["只处理 artifact symlink：docs/design、docs/features、docs/quality、process、checkpoints", "design-only，不授权任何 untrack", "拆出 .claude/** 为独立 CR"], pros_cons: "推荐方案覆盖 tracked ignored 的主要回归面；只处理 symlink 更保守但保留 .claude 冲突；design-only 无 remediation；拆分会增加门禁轮次。", impact_risk: "CP6 会产生 Git index 变更，后续提交/发布必须另起 remote/publication gate。", rollback_switch: "若 CP6 前发现路径不在 Git index 或存在 symlink 异常，停止并回 CP5 修订子集。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T09:30:34+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR121-DIRECTORY-ROUTING-REMEDIATION-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T09:30:34+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR121-02, gate: CP5, decision_type: scope, question: "哪些对象仅审计、不在 CR121 中整改？", recommendation: "将 AGENTS.md、docs/qmt/**、docs/goldminer/**、docs/release/*.md、.gitignore、guardrail/checker scripts 标记为 audit-only。", alternatives: ["把 AGENTS.md 也纳入 untrack", "把 docs/qmt/** / docs/goldminer/** 纳入本 CR 内容治理", "同时授权 .gitignore 和 checker hardening"], pros_cons: "推荐方案避免混合内容治理和代码实现；备选会扩大范围或破坏当前规则入口。", impact_risk: "audit-only 会保留部分 tracked/ignored 或 merge 回流风险，需要后续 CR 决策。", rollback_switch: "若用户要处理 audit-only 对象，必须新建或重开更明确的内容 / 代码 / policy CR。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T09:30:34+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR121-DIRECTORY-ROUTING-REMEDIATION-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T09:30:34+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR121-03, gate: CP5, decision_type: security, question: "CP5 approve 后仍禁止哪些动作？", recommendation: "即使 CP5 approve，也继续禁止删除/移动/覆盖、.gitignore 修改、源码/tests/checker 修改、git add/commit/push/remote write、checkout/reset/clean、runtime/NAS/凭据/交易/provider/lake/catalog/publish。", alternatives: ["同时授权 .gitignore 修改", "同时授权 commit", "同时授权 checker hardening"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小；备选会把 index cleanup、发布治理和代码治理混在一个门禁里。", impact_risk: "防止 CP5 remediation 被误解为发布或代码实现授权。", rollback_switch: "如需任一禁止动作，另起对应 CP5 / high-risk gate。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T09:30:34+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR121-DIRECTORY-ROUTING-REMEDIATION-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T09:30:34+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR121-04, gate: CP5, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受 CP6 index-only cleanup 后出现本地 Git index dirty 状态，且不自动提交 / 推送？", recommendation: "接受：CP6 只做本地 index-only remediation 和验证；提交、推送、远端治理、default branch / tag / history 均不授权。", alternatives: ["CP6 后立即另起 publication gate", "本轮不执行 cleanup", "将 cleanup 和 commit 合并到一个高风险门禁"], pros_cons: "推荐方案风险可控且保留审计；publication gate 更完整但增加门禁；不执行 cleanup 最保守但不修复；合并 commit 范围过大。", impact_risk: "本地 index 变更需要后续人类决定是否纳入仓库发布。", rollback_switch: "若用户不能接受 dirty index，选择不执行 cleanup 或先设计 publication gate。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T09:30:34+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR121-DIRECTORY-ROUTING-REMEDIATION-AUTHORIZATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T09:30:34+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR121-01, gate: CP2, decision_type: scope, question: "是否接受将 FU-CR120-001 升格为 CR121，并以 merge-induced directory routing regression hardening 为独立范围？", recommendation: "接受 CR121 作为独立 standard CR，CP2 只确认范围和候选清单。", alternatives: ["仅保留 follow-up candidate", "拆成多个 CR", "reject 并取消候选"], pros_cons: "推荐方案保留追溯并避免目录治理问题被 CR120 closure 吞掉；保留候选最保守但不推进；拆分会增加门禁成本。", impact_risk: "影响 docs 分层路由、artifact symlink、ignored-but-tracked 路径和后续 merge guardrail。", rollback_switch: "reject 时关闭 CR121 并把 FU-CR120-001 标记 cancelled；暂缓时回到 candidate。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T09:16:46+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR121-DIRECTORY-ROUTING-REGRESSION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T09:16:46+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR121-02, gate: CP2, decision_type: implementation, question: "是否接受分阶段路线：CP2 仅做 read-only audit / scope freeze，所有 .gitignore、Git index、checker、guardrail 或 git rm --cached 等整改必须等 CP5？", recommendation: "接受 staged route，CP2 不改代码、不改 .gitignore、不清理 index。", alternatives: ["design-only 不进入 CP5", "直接进入 CP5", "拆成 audit CR 和 cleanup CR"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限边界清楚；design-only 无 enforcement；直接 CP5 更快但容易混淆授权；拆分更重。", impact_risk: "CP2 暂不产生源码、.gitignore、tests 或 index diff。", rollback_switch: "若用户要求立即整改，必须先生成 CP5 implementation / cleanup gate，不得直接执行。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T09:16:46+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR121-DIRECTORY-ROUTING-REGRESSION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T09:16:46+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR121-03, gate: CP2, decision_type: scope, question: "是否冻结初始检查对象全集？", recommendation: "接受对象全集：docs/design、docs/features、docs/quality、process、checkpoints、.claude/**、AGENTS.md、docs/qmt/**、docs/goldminer/**、docs/release/*.md、.gitignore、guardrail/checker scripts；CP5 再裁剪整改子集。", alternatives: ["只处理 docs/design / docs/features", "排除 .claude/** / AGENTS.md", "只处理 ignored-but-tracked 路径"], pros_cons: "推荐方案不漏掉 merge 回流路径；窄范围风险更低但可能遗漏同类回归；只处理 tracked ignored 会忽略旧文档回流。", impact_risk: "范围较宽，但 CP2 不执行整改。", rollback_switch: "CP5 前如发现对象全集过宽，可在 CP5 裁剪 owner / remediation subset。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T09:16:46+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR121-DIRECTORY-ROUTING-REGRESSION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T09:16:46+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR121-04, gate: CP2, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "是否继续禁止 runtime/NAS/credentials/trading/provider/lake/catalog/publish，并禁止 git rm --cached、删除、移动、reset/checkout、远端写？", recommendation: "继续禁止；只允许本地静态检查和 process 文件更新。", alternatives: ["暂停所有验证命令", "另起 git index cleanup CP5", "另起 runtime gate"], pros_cons: "推荐方案足够支撑 CP2；暂停所有验证会降低可检查性；git cleanup 和 runtime 都应独立门禁。", impact_risk: "防止把目录路由 hardening 误解为 Git index cleanup 或外部系统授权。", rollback_switch: "任一真实清理、外部访问或运行需求必须另起 CP5 / high-risk gate。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T09:16:46+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR121-DIRECTORY-ROUTING-REGRESSION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T09:16:46+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR120-01, gate: CP8, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受 CR120 当前 READY 结论并关闭？", recommendation: "接受 READY；关闭 CR120 当前交付。", alternatives: ["回到 CP5 收窄 checker 规则", "追加更多 fixture 后再关闭", "取消本实现并退回 follow-up candidate"], pros_cons: "推荐方案已有 focused tests 和当前项目自检；备选会增加成本或保留 enforcement 缺口。", impact_risk: "当前仓库 legacy checker 未同步实现。", rollback_switch: "若未来仍消费 legacy checker，另起 cleanup CR。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T08:58:36+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR120-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T08:58:36+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR120-02, gate: CP8, decision_type: follow_up_tracking, question: "是否创建后续候选？", recommendation: "不创建新 follow-up；当前实现已覆盖 FU-CR114-004 目标。", alternatives: ["创建 legacy checker cleanup 候选", "创建历史 CR tracking 批量重写候选", "创建 event ledger 结构化 mirror 候选"], pros_cons: "推荐方案避免 backlog 膨胀；备选均超出本 CR 最小目标。", impact_risk: "legacy checker 与正式 meta-flow checker 能力可能继续不同。", rollback_switch: "后续若实际使用 legacy checker，再启动独立 CR。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T08:58:36+08:00; user separately requested directory routing merge audit, tracked as FU-CR120-001", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR120-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T08:58:36+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR120-03, gate: CP8, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP8 是否授权 runtime、NAS、凭据、交易写或 publish？", recommendation: "不授权；本交付仅为本地静态 checker / fixture。", alternatives: ["另起 runtime gate", "另起 NAS gate", "另起 publish gate"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小；备选与本 CR 无关。", impact_risk: "防止把 checker READY 误解为运行时授权。", rollback_switch: "任何 runtime/NAS/publish 需求必须独立门禁。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-23T08:58:36+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR120-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-23T08:58:36+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR120-01, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "是否授权最小 source / checker implementation owner？", recommendation: "授权仅修改 ../meta-flow/meta_flow/checks/cr_tracking.py，为 formal CR / FU row convention 增加 focused validation。", alternatives: ["只新增 tests 不改 checker", "改当前仓库 legacy scripts/check_cr_tracking_consistency.py", "暂停实现"], pros_cons: "推荐方案命中实际 meta-flow check cr-tracking；test-only 不能 enforcement；legacy checker 不是主入口；暂停保留缺口。", impact_risk: "会产生外部 meta-flow source diff；必须保持范围最小。", rollback_switch: "若外部 repo owner 不可写或测试失败，停止并回 CP5 修改 owner。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-22T20:04:30+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR120-CR-TRACKING-ROW-CONVENTION-IMPLEMENTATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-22T20:04:30+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR120-02, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "是否授权新增 focused tests？", recommendation: "新增 ../meta-flow/tests/test_cr120_cr_tracking_row_convention.py，覆盖 candidate->active、formal active mirror、closed/no-follow-up 等 row convention fixture。", alternatives: ["扩展既有 test_cr_lifecycle.py", "只用手工 checker run", "暂缓测试"], pros_cons: "新文件隔离清晰；扩展旧测试会混合生命周期主题；手工 run 不足以防回归。", impact_risk: "增加外部 meta-flow tests diff。", rollback_switch: "若测试结构与 repo 规范冲突，改为扩展现有测试文件。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-22T20:04:30+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR120-CR-TRACKING-ROW-CONVENTION-IMPLEMENTATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-22T20:04:30+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR120-03, gate: CP5, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP5 approve 是否授权任何 runtime / NAS / credentials / trading / provider / lake / catalog / publish？", recommendation: "不授权；只允许本地静态 / fixture 验证命令。", alternatives: ["暂停所有验证命令", "另起 runtime gate", "只运行 checker 不跑 tests"], pros_cons: "推荐方案可验证且权限最小；暂停会阻断实施；runtime gate 与本任务无关；只跑 checker 覆盖不足。", impact_risk: "防止 implementation gate 被误解为真实运行授权。", rollback_switch: "任何真实外部动作都必须另起高风险门禁。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-22T20:04:30+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR120-CR-TRACKING-ROW-CONVENTION-IMPLEMENTATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-22T20:04:30+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR120-04, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "是否同步修改当前仓库 legacy checker？", recommendation: "不修改 scripts/check_cr_tracking_consistency.py；本 CR 先硬化实际 meta-flow check cr-tracking。", alternatives: ["同时改 legacy checker", "只改 legacy checker", "创建后续 legacy cleanup 候选"], pros_cons: "推荐方案避免双实现扩散；同时改增加维护成本；只改 legacy 无法影响正式命令。", impact_risk: "legacy checker 与 package checker 可能继续存在能力差异。", rollback_switch: "若后续仍消费 legacy checker，再另起 follow-up。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-22T20:04:30+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR120-CR-TRACKING-ROW-CONVENTION-IMPLEMENTATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-22T20:04:30+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR120-05, gate: CP5, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受在现有 CR118 / CR119 dirty diff 上叠加 CR120 外部 meta-flow diff？", recommendation: "接受叠加；实现时不回滚当前仓库 CR118 / CR119 diff，并额外运行 CR118 / CR119 目标测试。", alternatives: ["先提交或清理当前工作区", "暂停 CR120", "将 CR120 改为 design-only"], pros_cons: "推荐方案推进最快且不破坏现有 diff；清理更干净但延后；design-only 无 enforcement。", impact_risk: "多仓库 diff 并存，验证必须明确分层。", rollback_switch: "若 CR118 / CR119 tests 或 meta-flow tests 失败，停止并回 CP5/相关 CR 收敛。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-22T20:04:30+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR120-CR-TRACKING-ROW-CONVENTION-IMPLEMENTATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-22T20:04:30+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR120-01, gate: CP2, decision_type: scope, question: "是否接受将 FU-CR114-004 升格为 CR120，并以 CR tracking formal/FU row convention hardening 为独立范围？", recommendation: "接受 CR120 作为独立 standard CR，CP2 只确认范围和授权边界。", alternatives: ["暂缓，退回 follow-up candidate", "reject 并取消候选"], pros_cons: "推荐方案保留追溯并解决高频一致性缺口；暂缓不新增风险但继续依赖人工同步；reject 结束该候选。", impact_risk: "影响 CR tracking、follow-up row、mirror row 和后续 checker 目标。", rollback_switch: "reject 时关闭 CR120 并把 FU-CR114-004 标记 cancelled；暂缓时回 candidate。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-22T19:54:11+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR120-CR-TRACKING-ROW-CONVENTION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-22T19:54:11+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR120-02, gate: CP2, decision_type: implementation, question: "是否接受分阶段路线：CP2 仅做 scope / owner discovery / target definition，源码、tests 和 checker implementation 必须等 CP5？", recommendation: "接受 staged route，CP2 不改代码，CP5 再决定最小实现切片。", alternatives: ["仅继续写设计说明，不进入 CP5", "合并到后续更大的 CR tracking checker 统一改造"], pros_cons: "推荐方案边界清晰且可小步验证；design-only 无 enforcement；统一改造更完整但范围更大。", impact_risk: "影响是否可以后续触碰 scripts/ 与 tests/。", rollback_switch: "若 CP5 前 owner 不清，回到 CP2/CP5 修改范围。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-22T19:54:11+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR120-CR-TRACKING-ROW-CONVENTION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-22T19:54:11+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR120-03, gate: CP2, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "是否继续禁止 runtime / NAS / credentials / trading / provider / lake / catalog / publish？", recommendation: "继续禁止，仅允许本地静态 / fixture 检查。", alternatives: ["暂停所有验证命令直到 CP5", "另起 runtime gate"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小且足够支撑本地 checker 设计；暂停会阻断后续验证；runtime gate 与本任务无关。", impact_risk: "防止 row convention hardening 被误解为真实运行授权。", rollback_switch: "任何 runtime/NAS/publish 需求必须另起独立门禁。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-22T19:54:11+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR120-CR-TRACKING-ROW-CONVENTION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-22T19:54:11+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR120-04, gate: CP2, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受在当前工作区已有 CR118 / CR119 未提交 checker diff 的前提下启动 CR120 process gate？", recommendation: "接受；CR120 CP2 只写 process artifacts，不回滚既有源码/tests diff。", alternatives: ["先要求提交或清理 CR118/CR119 diff", "暂缓 CR120"], pros_cons: "推荐方案不破坏已验证改动；清理更干净但延后；暂缓保持缺口。", impact_risk: "若后续 CP5 实施，需叠加验证 CR118 / CR119 测试，避免回归。", rollback_switch: "若现有测试失败，停止 CP5 并先收敛 CR118/CR119 diff。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-22T19:54:11+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR120-CR-TRACKING-ROW-CONVENTION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-22T19:54:11+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR119-01, gate: CP8, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受 CR119 当前 READY 结论并关闭？", recommendation: "接受 READY；关闭 CR119 当前交付。", alternatives: ["回到 CP5 收窄 checker 规则", "追加更多 fixture 后再关闭", "取消本实现并退回 contract-only"], pros_cons: "推荐方案已有目标测试和 checker 自检；收窄或追加 fixture 增加成本；退回 contract-only 会丧失 launch message enforcement。", impact_risk: "历史 launch message 不批量修复；未来误报需另起小修 CR。", rollback_switch: "若用户不接受 READY，保持 CR119 active 并回到 CP5 或修改实现。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-22T19:37:10+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR119-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-22T19:37:10+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR119-02, gate: CP8, decision_type: follow_up_tracking, question: "是否创建后续候选？", recommendation: "不创建新 follow-up；当前实现已覆盖 CR115 follow-up 目标。", alternatives: ["创建历史 launch message 批量扫描候选", "创建自动生成 launch message 候选", "创建跨平台 launch message contract 候选"], pros_cons: "推荐方案避免 backlog 膨胀；备选均超出本 CR 最小目标。", impact_risk: "后续若发现误报 / 漏报，可从实际反馈起 CR。", rollback_switch: "用户要求更严格 enforcement 时再启动独立候选。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-22T19:37:10+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR119-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-22T19:37:10+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR119-03, gate: CP8, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP8 是否授权 runtime、NAS、凭据、交易写或 publish？", recommendation: "不授权；本交付仅为本地静态 checker / fixture。", alternatives: ["另起 runtime gate", "另起 NAS gate", "另起 publish gate"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小；备选与本 CR 无关。", impact_risk: "防止把 checker READY 误解为运行时授权。", rollback_switch: "任何 runtime/NAS/publish 需求必须独立门禁。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-22T19:37:10+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR119-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-22T19:37:10+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR119-01, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "是否授权最小源码 / tests / checker implementation 切片？", recommendation: "授权仅修改 scripts/check_human_gate_decision_brief.py，并新增 tests/test_cr119_human_gate_launch_message_checker.py fixture tests。", alternatives: ["只写设计不改代码", "仅新增测试先 red", "暂停 CR119"], pros_cons: "推荐方案最小且可验证；design-only 无 enforcement；test-first 会留下失败测试直到实现；暂停保持缺口。", impact_risk: "产生源码和 tests diff；必须叠加现有 CR118 diff，不得回滚。", rollback_switch: "若实现发现 owner 不足，停止并回 CP5 修改 owner 列表。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-22T19:29:39+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR119-HUMAN-GATE-LAUNCH-MESSAGE-CHECKER-IMPLEMENTATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-22T19:29:39+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR119-02, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "launch message checker target 如何冻结？", recommendation: "检查 checklist path、自动预检结论、Context Capsule Summary / coverage 摘要、待决策数量、待决策表、三个 exact replies、不授权项。", alternatives: ["只检查 exact replies", "只检查 checklist path + decision count", "把全部格式检查转为 warning-only"], pros_cons: "推荐方案覆盖 CR115 contract；窄检查保留缺口；warning-only 不形成 enforcement。", impact_risk: "影响后续 CP2/CP3/CP5/CP8 launch message 可检查性。", rollback_switch: "若误报历史文件，限定为新 fixture / explicit launch-message-file，不扫全量历史。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-22T19:29:39+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR119-HUMAN-GATE-LAUNCH-MESSAGE-CHECKER-IMPLEMENTATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-22T19:29:39+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR119-03, gate: CP5, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP5 approve 是否授权任何 runtime / NAS / credentials / trading / provider / lake / catalog / publish？", recommendation: "不授权；只允许本地静态 / fixture 验证命令。", alternatives: ["暂停所有验证命令", "另起 runtime gate", "只允许运行 human-gate checker 不运行 tests"], pros_cons: "推荐方案可验证且权限最小；暂停会阻断实施；runtime gate 与本任务无关；只跑 checker 不足以覆盖实现。", impact_risk: "防止 implementation gate 被误解为真实运行授权。", rollback_switch: "任何真实外部动作都必须另起高风险门禁。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-22T19:29:39+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR119-HUMAN-GATE-LAUNCH-MESSAGE-CHECKER-IMPLEMENTATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-22T19:29:39+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR119-04, gate: CP5, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受在现有 CR118 dirty source/test diff 上叠加 CR119 最小改动？", recommendation: "接受叠加；实现时不回滚 scripts/check_human_gate_decision_brief.py 现有改动，不删除 tests/test_cr118_human_gate_path_alias_checker.py。", alternatives: ["先要求提交或清理 CR118 diff", "暂停 CR119", "改为新独立 checker 文件"], pros_cons: "推荐方案符合当前工作区且避免破坏 CR118；清理更干净但延后；新文件增加重复 checker 维护成本。", impact_risk: "同一文件承载 CR118 与 CR119 diff，验证需覆盖两者。", rollback_switch: "若 diff 冲突或 CR118 测试失败，停止实现并回 CP5/CR118 收敛。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-22T19:29:39+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR119-HUMAN-GATE-LAUNCH-MESSAGE-CHECKER-IMPLEMENTATION-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-22T19:29:39+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR119-01, gate: CP2, decision_type: scope, question: "是否接受将 FU-CR115-001 升格为 CR119，并仅在 CP2 确认 checker implementation candidate 的范围？", recommendation: "接受 CR119 作为独立 implementation candidate gate，CP2 只确认范围和分阶段路线。", alternatives: ["暂缓，退回 CR115 follow-up candidate", "reject 并取消候选"], pros_cons: "推荐方案保留追溯并避免 CR115 越权；暂缓无新增风险但不推进 enforcement；reject 结束该候选。", impact_risk: "影响 CR tracking、follow-up tracking 和后续 CP5 是否可启动。", rollback_switch: "reject 时关闭 CR119 并把 FU-CR115-001 标记 cancelled；暂缓时回到 blocked/candidate。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-22T19:22:43+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR119-HUMAN-GATE-LAUNCH-MESSAGE-CHECKER-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-22T19:22:43+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR119-02, gate: CP2, decision_type: implementation, question: "是否接受分阶段实现路线：CP2 只授权设计 / owner discovery / checker target definition，源码/tests/checker 修改必须等 CP5？", recommendation: "接受 staged route，CP2 不改代码，CP5 再决定最小实现切片。", alternatives: ["仅继续写设计说明，不进入 CP5", "要求一次性 CP2+CP5 合并门禁后再实施"], pros_cons: "推荐方案边界清楚且可审计；design-only 风险最低但无 enforcement；合并门禁节省轮次但更容易混淆授权。", impact_risk: "CP2 暂不产生源码/tests diff；后续 CP5 才能进入实现。", rollback_switch: "若用户要求立刻实现，必须先生成 CP5 implementation gate，不得直接改代码。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-22T19:22:43+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR119-HUMAN-GATE-LAUNCH-MESSAGE-CHECKER-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-22T19:22:43+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR119-03, gate: CP2, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "是否继续禁止 runtime / NAS / credentials / trading / provider / lake / catalog / publish？", recommendation: "继续禁止，仅允许后续本地静态 / fixture 检查。", alternatives: ["只开放本地静态命令", "暂停所有验证命令直到 CP5"], pros_cons: "推荐方案可验证且权限最小；静态命令白名单需更细清单；暂停所有验证会阻断后续 checker 验证。", impact_risk: "防止 checker implementation CR 被误解为 runtime 授权。", rollback_switch: "如需真实 runtime、NAS、凭据、交易或 publish，必须另起高风险门禁。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-22T19:22:43+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR119-HUMAN-GATE-LAUNCH-MESSAGE-CHECKER-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-22T19:22:43+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CONCRETE-CR102-01, gate: CR102-FUTURE-CONCRETE-EXECUTION-AUTHORIZATION, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "是否授权本轮进入真实研究机侧 NAS package exchange 验证？", recommendation: "授权 agent-assisted 研究机侧验证，限定为本 release id 的 staging -> package exchange -> release label；执行机侧只做手工验证记录。", alternatives: ["只生成 runbook 不执行", "只做 check/list/read 不 write/publish", "取消 CR102 真实 NAS 验证"], pros_cons: "推荐方案能完成策略研究机到执行机包交换链路的研究机侧真实验证；备选更保守但验证不足。", impact_risk: "涉及真实 NAS 写入 / publish label，风险为路径污染、半写入、覆盖误操作。", rollback_switch: "若执行前发现路径冲突、权限异常或用户撤回，停止并回到本门禁修订；执行机验证失败时记录为 manual follow-up，不重复写 NAS。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-21T08:47:58+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CR102-FUTURE-CONCRETE-EXECUTION-AUTHORIZATION-GATE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-21T08:39:38+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CONCRETE-CR102-02, gate: CR102-FUTURE-CONCRETE-EXECUTION-AUTHORIZATION, decision_type: security, question: "是否采用 CR059 研究机路径和用户确认身份 / 凭据边界？", recommendation: "采用 CR059 本地规划路径；mount_required=false，network_probe_authorized=false，authorized_identity_label=current-shell-user，credential_source=none-needed。", alternatives: ["用户另给本地 build source path", "改为完全手工执行", "授权 mount/network probe"], pros_cons: "推荐方案避免凭据和网络探测；备选会扩大权限或降低自动证据。", impact_risk: "CR059 是本地规划文档，真实 mount 状态在执行前才会以最小动作验证；不读取凭据。", rollback_switch: "若路径不存在或权限不足，按 rollback-then-stop 停止，并要求用户修订路径或手工处理。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-21T08:47:58+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CR102-FUTURE-CONCRETE-EXECUTION-AUTHORIZATION-GATE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-21T08:39:38+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CONCRETE-CR102-03, gate: CR102-FUTURE-CONCRETE-EXECUTION-AUTHORIZATION, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "本轮 operation allowlist / denylist 如何冻结？", recommendation: "allowlist: access,check,list,read,copy,write,publish；manual: pull/readback on execution machine；denylist: delete,mount,network_probe,credential_read,runtime,trading,provider_lake_catalog_publish。", alternatives: ["去掉 publish 只写 package target", "去掉 write/copy 只做 check/list/read", "另起 delete/mount gate"], pros_cons: "推荐方案覆盖真实包交换所需最小动作；备选降低风险但不能完整证明交换。", impact_risk: "写入和 publish 可能改变 NAS 状态；list/read 可能暴露路径元数据，必须摘要化。", rollback_switch: "任一操作超出 allowlist 时立即停止；delete/mount/network_probe 不由本门禁放行。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-21T08:47:58+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CR102-FUTURE-CONCRETE-EXECUTION-AUTHORIZATION-GATE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-21T08:39:38+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CONCRETE-CR102-04, gate: CR102-FUTURE-CONCRETE-EXECUTION-AUTHORIZATION, decision_type: implementation, question: "目录创建、覆盖、原子写和回滚策略是否按模板执行？", recommendation: "directory_create_policy=create-if-missing-only，scope 限定到 target release 子目录；overwrite_policy=forbid-overwrite；atomic_write_policy=temp-file-then-rename；on_failure=rollback-then-stop；timeout_seconds=300。", alternatives: ["overwrite-with-backup", "手工预创建目录", "source-only 检查不写入"], pros_cons: "推荐方案能最小化污染并保留可回滚路径；备选要么风险更高要么不完成交换。", impact_risk: "目录创建和写入会改变 NAS 状态；覆盖禁止可防止误伤既有包。", rollback_switch: "目标已存在或无法确认空目录时停止，不覆盖；只清理本次 temp 文件，不删除既有正式包。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-21T08:47:58+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CR102-FUTURE-CONCRETE-EXECUTION-AUTHORIZATION-GATE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-21T08:39:38+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CONCRETE-CR102-05, gate: CR102-FUTURE-CONCRETE-EXECUTION-AUTHORIZATION, decision_type: security, question: "evidence 如何脱敏并保存？", recommendation: "使用 redacted-hash-count；只保存 status、operation、nas_label、object_label、hash、count、bytes、timestamp、operator_label、rollback_status 到 process/checks/CR102-NAS-REAL-PACKAGE-EXCHANGE-EVIDENCE.md。", alternatives: ["用户手工 evidence", "只记录 pass/fail 无 hash", "保存原始日志"], pros_cons: "推荐方案可审计且不泄露内容；手工 evidence 安全但依赖人工；pass/fail 可审计性弱；原始日志不可接受。", impact_risk: "hash/bytes/count 仍是元数据，必须限定到本 release id；禁止 raw path/raw log/secret/account。", rollback_switch: "evidence 发现 forbidden field 时拒绝写入并要求脱敏；保留本地 process evidence，不写 NAS evidence。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-21T08:47:58+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CR102-FUTURE-CONCRETE-EXECUTION-AUTHORIZATION-GATE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-21T08:39:38+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CONCRETE-CR102-06, gate: CR102-FUTURE-CONCRETE-EXECUTION-AUTHORIZATION, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受执行机侧 pull/readback 由用户手工验证带来的残余风险？", recommendation: "接受：agent 不访问执行机路径；本轮研究机侧验证完成后，执行机侧 evidence 由用户补充或后续另起 gate。", alternatives: ["用户提供执行机 mount root 后重出门禁", "本轮不声明执行机验证完成", "取消 pull/readback 目标"], pros_cons: "推荐方案尊重执行机路径差异且避免越权；备选可更完整但需新输入或降低目标。", impact_risk: "本轮不能由 agent 证明执行机真实 pull 成功，只能证明研究机侧发布路径准备完成。", rollback_switch: "用户后续提供执行机 evidence 或 mount root 时，重开 execution-machine verification gate；本轮不自动补跑。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-21T08:47:58+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CR102-FUTURE-CONCRETE-EXECUTION-AUTHORIZATION-GATE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-21T08:39:38+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-RUNTIME-CR102-01, gate: CR102-FUTURE-RUNTIME-AUTHORIZATION, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "是否允许 CR102 从 CP5 design-only 状态进入 future runtime authorization 分支？", recommendation: "允许进入准备授权输入分支，但本轮仍不执行；只建立后续需要用户显式提供的输入清单。", alternatives: ["暂缓，保持 active-cp5-approved-no-execution-authorized", "关闭 CR102 为 blocked", "取消真实 NAS gate"], pros_cons: "推荐方案保留可审计推进路径且不触碰外部系统；暂缓最保守但无进展；关闭/取消会保留真实 NAS 验证缺口。", impact_risk: "影响 CR102 后续是否继续收集 path/mount/permission/operation/evidence 输入。", rollback_switch: "reject 时 CR102 保持 CP5 approved / no-execution；任何真实动作仍需后续具体执行门禁。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-21T07:15:15+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CR102-FUTURE-RUNTIME-AUTHORIZATION-GATE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-21T07:15:15+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-RUNTIME-CR102-02, gate: CR102-FUTURE-RUNTIME-AUTHORIZATION, decision_type: security, question: "真实 NAS path/export/root/mount/identity 是否可由用户在后续输入中提供？", recommendation: "只允许用户显式提供脱敏 label 或逐项文本；agent 不发现、不列取、不探测、不读取 env、不检查 mount。", alternatives: ["用户现在提供具体值但仍不授权访问", "线下人工确认后回传脱敏摘要", "授权 agent 探测"], pros_cons: "推荐方案避免路径泄漏和越权探测；用户提供值可加速但需重审；线下确认安全但依赖人工；agent 探测风险高。", impact_risk: "影响 path 泄露、凭据读取和 NAS 发现面；没有这些输入，任何运行仍 fail closed。", rollback_switch: "用户提供具体值后只写入授权草案，不得自动访问；要求 agent 探测时另起更高风险门禁。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-21T07:15:15+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CR102-FUTURE-RUNTIME-AUTHORIZATION-GATE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-21T07:15:15+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-RUNTIME-CR102-03, gate: CR102-FUTURE-RUNTIME-AUTHORIZATION, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "是否允许后续授权 check 操作作为最低风险真实 NAS 动作候选？", recommendation: "仅允许 check-only 候选资格；未来可评审 check=true，但必须同时具备 path/mount/identity/object scope/evidence/rollback；本轮 check 仍为 false。", alternatives: ["所有 NAS 操作继续 false", "同时允许 list/read 候选", "允许 copy/pull/write/publish/delete 候选"], pros_cons: "推荐方案保留最小真实验证路径；全部 false 最安全但无法真实验证；读写类风险更高。", impact_risk: "check 也可能触发目录状态、权限或元数据暴露；必须限制为脱敏 pass/fail/hash/count。", rollback_switch: "缺任一输入或用户未再次 approve 时 check 保持 false；list/read/write/publish/delete 拆独立 gate。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-21T07:15:15+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CR102-FUTURE-RUNTIME-AUTHORIZATION-GATE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-21T07:15:15+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-RUNTIME-CR102-04, gate: CR102-FUTURE-RUNTIME-AUTHORIZATION, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "write/copy/publish/pull/delete 是否必须拆成 high-risk gate？", recommendation: "是；任何 write/copy/publish/pull/delete 都不得由本门禁直接放行，必须另起 high-risk runtime gate。", alternatives: ["将 pull/copy 合并进 check gate", "将 publish/write/delete 合并进当前 CR102", "全部取消"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小；合并 pull/copy 可能接触真实包内容；合并 publish/write/delete 可能改变 NAS 状态；取消会关闭交付验证路线。", impact_risk: "publish/write/delete 可能造成真实包覆盖、污染或删除；pull/copy 可能复制敏感内容。", rollback_switch: "用户明确选择某类写/复制操作时，新建独立 DQ 和 rollback/evidence 设计，不复用本门禁 approve。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-21T07:15:15+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CR102-FUTURE-RUNTIME-AUTHORIZATION-GATE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-21T07:15:15+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-RUNTIME-CR102-05, gate: CR102-FUTURE-RUNTIME-AUTHORIZATION, decision_type: security, question: "evidence 是否继续 redacted-only 且禁止凭据/env/账户/runtime 原文？", recommendation: "是；只允许 status/hash/count/pass-fail 和用户提供的脱敏 label；禁止 token/secret/password/account/raw log/raw path/runtime output。", alternatives: ["用户手工上传脱敏 evidence", "允许本地 checker 生成 evidence", "允许原始日志作为附件"], pros_cons: "推荐方案最小化敏感面；手工脱敏可验证但依赖人工；checker 需要新实现和运行授权；原始日志不可接受。", impact_risk: "影响证据可审计性和敏感信息泄漏风险。", rollback_switch: "evidence 含 forbidden fields 时必须 reject；如需 checker，先走实现设计与运行授权。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-21T07:15:15+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CR102-FUTURE-RUNTIME-AUTHORIZATION-GATE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-21T07:15:15+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-RUNTIME-CR102-06, gate: CR102-FUTURE-RUNTIME-AUTHORIZATION, decision_type: implementation, question: "是否允许把 CP5 execution plan shell 升级为后续人工 runbook 候选？", recommendation: "允许作为人工 runbook 候选，但当前不写命令、不实现 checker、不执行；后续必须补 timeout、on_failure、rollback、dry-run/手工步骤和操作 allowlist。", alternatives: ["只保留 design-only，不准备 runbook", "直接实现 checker/CLI", "直接执行人工步骤"], pros_cons: "推荐方案为后续执行做准备且不越权；design-only 最保守但后续仍需重新设计；直接实现或执行当前越权风险高。", impact_risk: "影响后续是否能形成可审计执行计划；直接实现或执行可能被误用为 NAS check。", rollback_switch: "若用户要求 checker/CLI 或人工执行，必须另起 CP5/CP6/CP7 或 runtime execution gate，不由本轮 approve 覆盖。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-21T07:15:15+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CR102-FUTURE-RUNTIME-AUTHORIZATION-GATE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-21T07:15:15+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR102-01, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "是否批准当前 CP5 design-only 设计包？", recommendation: "批准 DESIGN / TEST-PLAN / TASKS / full LLD，后续只允许本地账本和设计收敛。", alternatives: ["修改后重提 CP5", "reject 回 CP3 approved", "只保留 HLD 不进入 CP5"], pros_cons: "推荐方案让后续授权门禁可计算；修改可更精细但延后；reject 保持 CR102 active blocked；HLD-only 缺少执行前设计细节。", impact_risk: "影响 CP5 状态、后续 runtime gate 输入和审计链。", rollback_switch: "发现 matrix/schema/shell 缺口时重提 CP5；reject 时保持 cp3-approved-no-execution。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-21T06:45:46+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR102-NAS-REAL-PACKAGE-EXCHANGE-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-21T06:45:46+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR102-02, gate: CP5, decision_type: security, question: "path/export/root/mount/identity 与 permission 是否继续 user-explicit-only？", recommendation: "保持全部 UNSET_BY_USER / not-authorized；agent 不发现、不探测、不读取 env。", alternatives: ["用户在修改中提供路径和身份但仍不授权访问", "暂停等线下确认", "授权 agent 探测"], pros_cons: "推荐方案安全边界最强；用户提供值需重审；线下确认会延后；agent 探测不推荐且越权风险高。", impact_risk: "防止路径泄漏、凭据读取和 NAS 探测。", rollback_switch: "用户后续提供具体值后，新建或重开 runtime_authorization gate。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-21T06:45:46+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR102-NAS-REAL-PACKAGE-EXCHANGE-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-21T06:45:46+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR102-03, gate: CP5, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP5 approve 是否授权任何真实 NAS/env/runtime/trading/publish 动作？", recommendation: "不授权；CP5 approve 只批准设计包，真实动作全部继续 false。", alternatives: ["另起 per-run NAS check gate", "用户手工线下验证后回传脱敏 evidence", "授权 agent 代跑真实 NAS"], pros_cons: "推荐方案符合当前约束；per-run gate 可控但需新输入；手工 evidence 可降低 agent 权限；agent 代跑风险最高。", impact_risk: "防止 CP5 被误读为运行许可。", rollback_switch: "任何真实动作必须新建/重开 runtime_authorization gate，并重新打印授权范围。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-21T06:45:46+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR102-NAS-REAL-PACKAGE-EXCHANGE-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-21T06:45:46+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR102-04, gate: CP5, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受 CP5 后 CR102 仍 blocked-for-execution？", recommendation: "接受 PASS_WITH_RISK：设计包 ready，但真实 NAS path/mount/permission/operation 仍未授权。", alternatives: ["阻塞到用户提供真实授权", "关闭 CR102 为 blocked", "取消真实 NAS gate"], pros_cons: "推荐方案保留可审计进展；阻塞会停止设计收敛；关闭/取消会保留真实验证缺口。", impact_risk: "不能声称真实 NAS ready，只能声称 authorization design ready。", rollback_switch: "用户不接受风险时，CR102 停在 CP5 pending 或回 CP3 修改。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-21T06:45:46+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR102-NAS-REAL-PACKAGE-EXCHANGE-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-21T06:45:46+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR102-05, gate: CP5, decision_type: follow_up_tracking, question: "future check/publish/pull/copy/delete 等如何分流？", recommendation: "全部保持独立 future runtime gate，不自动启动；publish/delete/write/copy 需 high-risk gate。", alternatives: ["合并 check 到当前 CR102 后续", "合并 publish/pull/copy", "全部取消"], pros_cons: "推荐方案边界最窄；合并 check 仍需授权；合并写类操作风险高；取消会关闭真实验证路线。", impact_risk: "影响 RA-CR101-003 后续台账和 CR089 overlap。", rollback_switch: "用户明确选择某一 future gate 时再创建正式 CR 或更新 CR102。", status: accepted, answer: "approve at 2026-06-21T06:45:46+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR102-NAS-REAL-PACKAGE-EXCHANGE-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-21T06:45:46+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP3-CR102-01, gate: CP3, decision_type: architecture, question: "是否批准 CR102 采用 two-plane authorization design？", recommendation: "批准 authorization ledger + future execution plan shell + evidence schema 分离架构。", alternatives: ["check-only direct design", "merge into CR089", "cancel real NAS gate"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小且可审计；check-only 需要真实授权；merge CR089 会扩大 runtime 风险；cancel 会保留真实 NAS 缺口。", impact_risk: "影响 CP5 设计对象、后续 gate、CR089 边界和验证路径。", rollback_switch: "若用户要求直接 check，回 CP3 修改 DQ 并补 path/mount/permission；若合并 CR089，则 CR102 标记 superseded。", status: accepted, answer: "批准 at 2026-06-20T22:01:10+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR102-NAS-REAL-PACKAGE-EXCHANGE-HLD-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T22:01:10+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP3-CR102-02, gate: CP3, decision_type: security, question: "path/export/root/mount/identity 与 permission 是否继续 user-explicit-only？", recommendation: "保持全部 UNSET_BY_USER / not-authorized；agent 不发现、不探测、不读取 env。", alternatives: ["用户在修改中提供路径和身份", "授权 agent 探测", "暂停等人工线下确认"], pros_cons: "推荐方案最安全；用户提供值可推进但需重审；agent 探测越权；线下确认会延后。", impact_risk: "防止 NAS 探测、凭据读取和路径泄漏。", rollback_switch: "用户提供具体值后，重生成 CP3/CP5 授权矩阵；未提供则 execution blocked。", status: accepted, answer: "批准 at 2026-06-20T22:01:10+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR102-NAS-REAL-PACKAGE-EXCHANGE-HLD-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T22:01:10+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP3-CR102-03, gate: CP3, decision_type: implementation, question: "CP5 是否只产出设计包，不执行 NAS？", recommendation: "CP5 只产出 authorization matrix、execution plan shell、evidence schema、rollback checklist。", alternatives: ["CP5 直接实现 check 脚本", "CP5 直接执行只读 check", "只写文档关闭"], pros_cons: "推荐方案符合门禁；脚本实现仍可能被误执行；直接 check 越权；文档-only 不能提高 readiness。", impact_risk: "影响后续 Story/LLD/TASKS 和验证方式。", rollback_switch: "若用户要求脚本或 check，必须先明确操作授权和运行环境，再重出 CP5。", status: accepted, answer: "批准 at 2026-06-20T22:01:10+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR102-NAS-REAL-PACKAGE-EXCHANGE-HLD-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T22:01:10+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP3-CR102-04, gate: CP3, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP3 approve 是否授权 NAS/env/runtime/trading/publish 动作？", recommendation: "不授权；所有真实动作继续 false。", alternatives: ["用户另起 per-run NAS check gate", "授权 agent 代跑真实 NAS", "授权 runtime/QMT 联动"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小；per-run gate 可控但需输入；agent 代跑和 runtime 联动风险最高。", impact_risk: "防止 CP3 被误读为外部操作许可。", rollback_switch: "任何真实动作必须新建或重开 runtime_authorization gate，并重新打印授权范围。", status: accepted, answer: "批准 at 2026-06-20T22:01:10+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR102-NAS-REAL-PACKAGE-EXCHANGE-HLD-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T22:01:10+08:00"}
