  - {id: DQ-CP3-CR102-05, gate: CP3, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受 CR089 overlap 与 CR102 blocked-for-execution 状态？", recommendation: "接受 PASS_WITH_RISK：CR102 只处理 NAS gate 架构，不恢复 CR089；CP3 后仍 blocked-for-execution。", alternatives: ["等 CR089 重评审", "合并 CR102 到 CR089", "取消 CR102"], pros_cons: "推荐方案边界最窄；等待或合并会阻塞/扩大风险；取消会关闭真实 NAS 路线。", impact_risk: "影响 CR tracking、follow-up backlog 和后续真实验证路线。", rollback_switch: "若用户不接受 overlap 风险，则 CR102 停止在 CP3 或 superseded。", status: accepted, answer: "批准 at 2026-06-20T22:01:10+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR102-NAS-REAL-PACKAGE-EXCHANGE-HLD-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T22:01:10+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR101-01, gate: CP8, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否按 READY_WITH_RISK 关闭 CR101 当前离线交付？", recommendation: "关闭为 READY_WITH_RISK；范围限于离线 contract / checker / evidence / docs。", alternatives: ["暂缓 CP8，要求补充真实验证", "退回 S04 修改文档"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小且完成架构重对齐；真实验证会引入高权限；退回文档会延后关闭。", impact_risk: "不证明真实 QMT / NAS / MiniQMT / order-write ready。", rollback_switch: "若用户不接受残余风险，停止 CP8 并另起 runtime_authorization CR。", status: accepted, answer: "批准，并推送到远端 at 2026-06-20T10:13:18+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR101-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T10:13:18+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR101-02, gate: CP8, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP8 approve 是否授权真实 NAS、凭据、QMT/MiniQMT/XtQuant/gateway runtime、simulation/live、交易或 publish？", recommendation: "不授权；CP8 只确认离线交付关闭。", alternatives: ["单独授权某个真实验证 gate", "授权 agent 代跑真实 runtime"], pros_cons: "推荐方案符合当前边界；单独 gate 可控；agent 代跑真实 runtime 风险最高。", impact_risk: "防止把设计 / 离线验证误读为真实运行授权。", rollback_switch: "任何真实动作必须新建 gate 并重新打印授权 / 不授权清单。", status: accepted, answer: "批准，并推送到远端 at 2026-06-20T10:13:18+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR101-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T10:13:18+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR101-03, gate: CP8, decision_type: follow_up_tracking, question: "4 个后续 gate 如何处理？", recommendation: "全部登记为 candidate-not-started，不自动启动。", alternatives: ["立即启动 QMT direct-run validation", "立即启动 MiniQMT gateway validation"], pros_cons: "推荐方案避免越权；立即启动需要额外 runtime 证据和用户授权。", impact_risk: "影响 CR089 / order-write 后续路线，但不阻断 CR101 关闭。", rollback_switch: "用户指定 gate 时，先做冲突预检并分配新 CR。", status: accepted, answer: "批准，并推送到远端 at 2026-06-20T10:13:18+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR101-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T10:13:18+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR101-04, gate: CP8, decision_type: implementation, question: "是否接受 S01-S04 当前实现命名和验证矩阵作为 CR101 当前交付基线？", recommendation: "接受当前实现：qmt_terminal_direct delivery target、miniqmt_gateway_readonly adapter、CR101 fake checker、evidence boundary。", alternatives: ["要求改名或拆分 schema", "退回 S01/S02/S03 修改"], pros_cons: "推荐方案与 CP3/CP5 一致；改名会扩大回归；拆分会延长交付。", impact_risk: "影响后续 package / checker / evidence 消费。", rollback_switch: "若用户要求命名变更，回退对应 Story 并重跑 CP6/CP7。", status: accepted, answer: "批准，并推送到远端 at 2026-06-20T10:13:18+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR101-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T10:13:18+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR101-05, gate: CP8, decision_type: follow_up_tracking, question: "CR089、CR020 或 order-write 是否自动恢复？", recommendation: "不自动恢复；CR089 保持 blocked，CR020 路线不恢复，order-write 仍等待独立 gate。", alternatives: ["自动启动 CR089", "恢复 CR020", "启动 order-write design"], pros_cons: "推荐方案避免把 CR101 离线 ready 扩展成真实运行；备选均需高权限门禁。", impact_risk: "防止后续工作越权或消费错误 readiness。", rollback_switch: "用户明确选择后，重新做 CR 冲突预检和 runtime authorization。", status: accepted, answer: "批准，并推送到远端 at 2026-06-20T10:13:18+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR101-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T10:13:18+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR101-01, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "是否批准 4 个 Story 的 LLD batch 和 Wave / merge order？", recommendation: "批准 S01 -> S02/S03 -> S04 的批次；CP5 后才允许进入受限离线实现。", alternatives: ["拆成两个 CP5 批次", "退回 CP4 重新拆 Story"], pros_cons: "推荐方案覆盖完整且依赖清晰；拆批可降低审查压力但延长门禁；退回 CP4 会推迟修复架构漂移。", impact_risk: "影响 story execution 排期、文件 owner、CP6/CP7 验证范围。", rollback_switch: "若实现时发现 S02/S03 文件冲突不可控，暂停并回 CP5 拆分或指定单一 merge owner。", status: accepted, answer: "批准 at 2026-06-20T09:30:00+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR101-CROSS-PLATFORM-STRATEGY-DELIVERY-LLD-BATCH.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T09:30:00+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR101-02, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "manifest target taxonomy 是否按 S01 LLD 冻结？", recommendation: "冻结 delivery_targets / execution_adapters 双边界，当前唯一 implemented delivery target 为 qmt_terminal_direct，MiniQMT 只作为 readonly execution adapter contract。", alternatives: ["QMT-only schema", "保留旧 miniqmt_runner 兼容作为 delivery target"], pros_cons: "推荐方案符合 CP3 并可扩展；QMT-only 后续返工；旧 delivery target 会继续混淆 runner host 和 adapter。", impact_risk: "影响 package_loader、manifest fixture、package exchange、adapter payload 和 tests。", rollback_switch: "若旧 fixture 迁移风险过高，可临时读旧 manifest 但新输出仍禁止 miniqmt_runner delivery target。", status: accepted, answer: "批准 at 2026-06-20T09:30:00+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR101-CROSS-PLATFORM-STRATEGY-DELIVERY-LLD-BATCH.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T09:30:00+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR101-03, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "checker / fixture / evidence 负向验证是否按 S02/S03 LLD 执行？", recommendation: "执行 8 类 checker fail-closed、evidence sensitive hit 0、forbidden counters 0、readonly gateway regression。", alternatives: ["只覆盖 checker，不改 evidence", "只改 evidence，不迁移 CR100 fake exchange"], pros_cons: "推荐方案一次关闭主要漂移；拆开会留下边界缺口；跳过任一侧会弱化 CP7 证据。", impact_risk: "影响 package_exchange、adapters、evidence、readonly_gateway 和三组测试。", rollback_switch: "若测试成本超限，保留最小 8 类 checker 测试，evidence schema cleanup 转后续 CR。", status: accepted, answer: "批准 at 2026-06-20T09:30:00+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR101-CROSS-PLATFORM-STRATEGY-DELIVERY-LLD-BATCH.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T09:30:00+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR101-04, gate: CP5, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP5 approve 是否授权 NAS、凭据、QMT/MiniQMT/XtQuant/gateway runtime、simulation/live、交易或 publish？", recommendation: "不授权；CP5 只允许后续进行离线代码 / 文档实现和本地测试。", alternatives: ["用户另起 per-run gate 授权手工真实验证", "授权 agent 代跑真实 runtime"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小；手工真实验证需独立 evidence；agent 代跑真实 runtime 超出当前边界。", impact_risk: "不证明真实 NAS/QMT/MiniQMT/gateway/account/trading ready。", rollback_switch: "需要真实动作时另起 runtime_authorization CR，并重新打印授权 / 不授权清单。", status: accepted, answer: "批准 at 2026-06-20T09:30:00+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR101-CROSS-PLATFORM-STRATEGY-DELIVERY-LLD-BATCH.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T09:30:00+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR101-05, gate: CP5, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受 CP5 后仍只能达到 offline READY_WITH_RISK 的路线？", recommendation: "接受，CP7/CP8 以离线 contract / checker / redaction 证据关闭；真实验证后置候选 gate。", alternatives: ["要求真实 QMT/NAS/MiniQMT 验证后才继续", "关闭 CR101 为 blocked"], pros_cons: "推荐方案先消除架构漂移；真实验证会引入高权限和环境依赖；blocked 不能修正当前混淆。", impact_risk: "残余风险是离线 evidence 不能代表真实 runtime / NAS / account / trading 链路。", rollback_switch: "若用户不接受 READY_WITH_RISK，回退 CP2 将 CR101 改为 runtime-first CR。", status: accepted, answer: "批准 at 2026-06-20T09:30:00+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR101-CROSS-PLATFORM-STRATEGY-DELIVERY-LLD-BATCH.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T09:30:00+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR101-01, gate: CP2, decision_type: scope, question: "是否启动 CR101，并将本轮限定为跨平台策略交付与 adapter layer 重对齐？", recommendation: "启动 standard CR101，仅做设计 / schema / fixture / checker / package layout 重对齐，不直接实现真实运行链路。", alternatives: ["暂缓启动，保留 FU-CR091-005 为 candidate", "只做文档勘误不进入 CR"], pros_cons: "推荐方案能先修正历史 miniqmt_runner 混淆；暂缓会继续阻塞 CR089 / order-write；只做勘误缺少后续实现门禁。", impact_risk: "影响 manifest、checker、package layout、adapter protocol 和后续 HLD / CP5；不证明真实 runtime ready。", rollback_switch: "若 CP3 发现范围过大，回退到 CP2 拆分 target taxonomy 与 adapter protocol 两个 CR。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-20T08:17:33+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR101-CROSS-PLATFORM-STRATEGY-DELIVERY-SCOPE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T08:17:33+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR101-02, gate: CP2, decision_type: architecture, question: "runner 与 MiniQMT 的关系如何冻结？", recommendation: "runner 固定为 quant-lab-side；MiniQMT 只是当前 broker / execution adapter target，不承载策略运行职责。", alternatives: ["MiniQMT runner-hosted", "保留双 runner 模型"], pros_cons: "推荐方案职责清晰并可扩展到 Goldminer；MiniQMT-hosted 会把 runner 和接口宿主耦合；双 runner 增加验证矩阵。", impact_risk: "影响 strategy_runner 边界、adapter protocol、HLD、checker 和 package manifest。", rollback_switch: "若未来确需平台宿主 runner，另起 architecture CR 并定义独立 target。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-20T08:17:33+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR101-CROSS-PLATFORM-STRATEGY-DELIVERY-SCOPE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T08:17:33+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR101-03, gate: CP2, decision_type: implementation, question: "当前策略交付 target 支持哪些平台？", recommendation: "当前 implemented 仅 QMT direct-run；manifest / validation / package layout 保留 future targets，但不实现 Goldminer / generic Python。", alternatives: ["同时实现 MiniQMT target", "只做抽象 schema 不交付 QMT target"], pros_cons: "推荐方案匹配当前仅支持 QMT且控制范围；同时实现 MiniQMT 会扩大风险；只做抽象无法解除 CR089 阻塞。", impact_risk: "影响 package generation、entrypoint、fixture、checker、docs/qmt HLD。", rollback_switch: "若 QMT direct-run target 无法离线建模，CP3 回退为 Spike 或拆分。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-20T08:17:33+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR101-CROSS-PLATFORM-STRATEGY-DELIVERY-SCOPE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T08:17:33+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR101-04, gate: CP2, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "本 CR 是否授权真实 NAS / QMT / MiniQMT / XtQuant / gateway / simulation/live / 交易 / publish？", recommendation: "不授权。本 CR 只允许离线文件、schema、fixture、checker 和本地包结构验证；真实验证后续逐 run gate。", alternatives: ["授权用户手工真实验证", "授权 agent 代跑 runtime / NAS / publish"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小且符合当前对话；用户手工验证需要单独 evidence schema；agent 代跑越过当前边界。", impact_risk: "不证明真实 NAS、QMT direct-run、MiniQMT adapter 或交易链路 ready。", rollback_switch: "需要真实验证时另起 QMT-DIRECT-RUN-VALIDATION-FU、MINIQMT-GATEWAY-ADAPTER-VALIDATION-FU 或 NAS gate。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-20T08:17:33+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR101-CROSS-PLATFORM-STRATEGY-DELIVERY-SCOPE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T08:17:33+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR101-05, gate: CP2, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受先完成离线重对齐、真实运行后置的 READY_WITH_RISK 路线？", recommendation: "接受离线优先路线；CP8 若真实 runtime 未执行，可按证据结论关闭为 READY_WITH_RISK 并保留后续 gate。", alternatives: ["等真实环境授权后再做", "把 CR101 关闭为 blocked"], pros_cons: "推荐方案先修正架构和交付契约；等待真实环境会阻塞设计；blocked 不能消除当前混淆。", impact_risk: "残余风险是离线验证不证明真实 runtime、NAS 权限或交易安全。", rollback_switch: "若用户不接受 READY_WITH_RISK，CP2 退回并改为 runtime 授权 CR。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-20T08:17:33+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR101-CROSS-PLATFORM-STRATEGY-DELIVERY-SCOPE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T08:17:33+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP3-CR101-01, gate: CP3, decision_type: architecture, question: "是否批准 target + adapter 双边界作为 CR101 推荐架构？", recommendation: "批准方案 A：delivery_targets 表达策略交付 target，execution_adapters 表达 runner 到 broker/gateway 的 adapter。", alternatives: ["QMT-only 固化", "沿用 miniqmt_runner 历史字段"], pros_cons: "推荐方案职责最清晰并支持 future target；QMT-only 后续扩展返工；沿用历史字段继续混淆 runner host 和 adapter。", impact_risk: "影响 manifest、checker、fixture、package layout、HLD/LLD 和测试。", rollback_switch: "若 CP5 发现迁移范围过大，拆出 manifest migration Story 或回退 CP3 修订。", status: accepted, answer: "批准 at 2026-06-20T08:44:49+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR101-CROSS-PLATFORM-STRATEGY-DELIVERY-HLD-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T08:44:49+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP3-CR101-02, gate: CP3, decision_type: architecture, question: "当前 implemented delivery target 是否固定为 qmt_terminal_direct？", recommendation: "固定为唯一 implemented target；future target 只保留 schema slot。", alternatives: ["同时实现 MiniQMT target", "只做抽象 schema"], pros_cons: "推荐方案匹配 CP2 和当前基线且可验证；同时实现 MiniQMT 会扩大 runtime 误读；抽象-only 不可验证。", impact_risk: "不证明真实 QMT ready；只证明离线包结构和 checker 合同。", rollback_switch: "若 QMT direct-run target 无法离线建模，转 Spike 或降级为文档-only。", status: accepted, answer: "批准 at 2026-06-20T08:44:49+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR101-CROSS-PLATFORM-STRATEGY-DELIVERY-HLD-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T08:44:49+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP3-CR101-03, gate: CP3, decision_type: implementation, question: "CP5 是否按 manifest / checker / fixture / evidence 重对齐推进？", recommendation: "CP5 进入离线 LLD，覆盖 schema、checker、fixtures、negative tests、evidence redaction 和 package layout。", alternatives: ["只写文档不改实现", "直接进入代码修改不做 LLD"], pros_cons: "推荐方案符合 gate 并控制 shared file 冲突；文档-only 不能关闭风险；跳过 LLD 会扩大实现偏差。", impact_risk: "影响 trading/strategy_runner/*、tests、docs/qmt、package fixtures。", rollback_switch: "CP5 若发现文件冲突，拆分 Story 并按 CP5 批量 LLD 确认。", status: accepted, answer: "批准 at 2026-06-20T08:44:49+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR101-CROSS-PLATFORM-STRATEGY-DELIVERY-HLD-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T08:44:49+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP3-CR101-04, gate: CP3, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP3 approve 是否授权真实 NAS、凭据、QMT/MiniQMT/XtQuant/gateway runtime、simulation/live、交易或 publish？", recommendation: "不授权；CP3 只确认架构。", alternatives: ["用户手工真实验证另起 per-run gate", "授权 agent 代跑真实 runtime"], pros_cons: "推荐方案权限最小；用户手工验证需单独 evidence schema；agent 代跑越过当前边界。", impact_risk: "不证明真实 runtime、NAS、账号或交易链路 ready。", rollback_switch: "需要真实验证时另起 runtime_authorization CR，并重新打印不授权/授权清单。", status: accepted, answer: "批准 at 2026-06-20T08:44:49+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR101-CROSS-PLATFORM-STRATEGY-DELIVERY-HLD-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T08:44:49+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP3-CR101-05, gate: CP3, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受历史 miniqmt_runner 字段迁移风险和 READY_WITH_RISK 路线？", recommendation: "接受，要求 CP5/CP7 加负向验证，CP8 可在未真实运行时关闭为 READY_WITH_RISK。", alternatives: ["等真实环境授权后再做", "关闭 CR101 为 blocked"], pros_cons: "推荐方案先消除架构漂移；等待真实环境会阻塞；blocked 不能修正当前混淆。", impact_risk: "残余风险是离线证据不能代表真实 NAS/QMT/MiniQMT/gateway。", rollback_switch: "若用户不接受 READY_WITH_RISK，回退 CP2 改为 runtime-first CR。", status: accepted, answer: "批准 at 2026-06-20T08:44:49+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR101-CROSS-PLATFORM-STRATEGY-DELIVERY-HLD-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-20T08:44:49+08:00"}

  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR093-03, gate: CP8, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受 R-CR093-02 standalone checker warning 明细低于主 CLI？", recommendation: "接受，以主 CLI 为验收入口。", alternatives: ["本轮收敛两套 checker 输出"], pros_cons: "推荐方案聚焦目标；收敛输出是新范围。", impact_risk: "standalone 脚本可通过但 warning 细节少。", rollback_switch: "用户要求一致输出时启动 CR093-FU-02。", status: accepted, answer: "好了，同意接受所有项。下一步推进什么，你需要准备好上下文，我需要清除上下文了。 at 2026-06-19T08:39:22+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR093-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-19T08:39:22+08:00"}

  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR093-02, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "是否按 TASKS 的串行顺序实施？", recommendation: "先写测试，再改 checker，再最小规范化 CR019 tracking。", alternatives: ["先改 checker", "先改旧台账"], pros_cons: "推荐方案降低回归风险；先改实现容易缺少失败基线。", impact_risk: "有利于证明目标缺陷被修复。", rollback_switch: "若测试构造成本过高，可先 py_compile + cr-tracking 验证。", status: accepted, answer: "好的，同意，继续推进 at 2026-06-18T17:58:38+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR093-LEDGER-HYGIENE-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T17:58:38+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR093-03, gate: CP5, decision_type: security, question: "CP5 approve 是否继续禁止外部动作？", recommendation: "继续禁止；只允许读写列明的仓库文本文件。", alternatives: ["授权 NAS / runtime / 账户证据", "授权清理 broader warnings"], pros_cons: "推荐方案符合 ledger-only；备选扩大风险。", impact_risk: "无外部副作用。", rollback_switch: "用户要求外部动作时另起 CR。", status: accepted, answer: "好的，同意，继续推进 at 2026-06-18T17:58:38+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR093-LEDGER-HYGIENE-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T17:58:38+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR093-04, gate: CP5, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "broader warning-only 项是否仍不作为本轮 DoD？", recommendation: "接受；DoD 只要求 CR019 / CR025 阻断项收敛。", alternatives: ["本轮清所有 warnings", "全部 suppress"], pros_cons: "推荐方案聚焦目标；清全部会扩大范围。", impact_risk: "CP7 可能仍有 warning，但不阻断当前目标。", rollback_switch: "用户要求 warning 清零时另起后续 CR。", status: accepted, answer: "好的，同意，继续推进 at 2026-06-18T17:58:38+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR093-LEDGER-HYGIENE-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T17:58:38+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR093-05, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "CP5 approve 后允许的实施范围是什么？", recommendation: "只允许修改 scripts/check_cr_tracking_consistency.py、新增 tests/test_cr093_cr_tracking_consistency.py、最小修改 CR019 tracking 和必要 process 证据。", alternatives: ["仅改 checker", "仅改文档", "全量重写 checker"], pros_cons: "推荐方案覆盖根因且可验证；单边改动容易残留问题。", impact_risk: "进入 CP6 后以该范围为文件 owner。", rollback_switch: "超出文件范围必须回 CP5 或新 CR。", status: accepted, answer: "好的，同意，继续推进 at 2026-06-18T17:58:38+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR093-LEDGER-HYGIENE-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T17:58:38+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP3-CR093-01, gate: CP3, decision_type: architecture, question: "checker 当前状态读取模型如何冻结？", recommendation: "采用 current / tracking-current / audit-history 三层模型；history 不作为 current failure。", alternatives: ["继续全文扫描", "完全跳过 history"], pros_cons: "推荐方案兼顾审计与准确性；全文扫描继续误报；完全跳过 history 会失去审计价值。", impact_risk: "修复 CR025 / CR092 nested active_change 误报。", rollback_switch: "若审计要求强扫 history，改为 audit-only warning。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-18T17:55:00+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR093-LEDGER-HYGIENE-HLD-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T17:55:00+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP3-CR093-02, gate: CP3, decision_type: implementation, question: "CP5 设计是否采用状态等价表 + 最小 CR019 台账规范化？", recommendation: "采用集中状态等价表，并只做必要文档规范化。", alternatives: ["只改文档", "只改 checker", "全量重写 checker"], pros_cons: "推荐方案修根因且改动可控；只改单边会留下歧义；全量重写成本高。", impact_risk: "CP5 需输出 fixture、回滚和文件 owner。", rollback_switch: "CP5 发现成本过高时降级为最小账本规范化。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-18T17:55:00+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR093-LEDGER-HYGIENE-HLD-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T17:55:00+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP3-CR093-03, gate: CP3, decision_type: security, question: "CP3 approve 是否继续不授权实施和外部动作？", recommendation: "继续不授权；只允许进入 CP5 LLD / TEST-PLAN / TASKS。", alternatives: ["直接授权修 checker", "授权读取 NAS / runtime / 账户证据"], pros_cons: "推荐方案符合门禁；直接实施会越过 CP5，外部动作不属于本 CR。", impact_risk: "防止把架构批准误读成代码 / 账本修复批准。", rollback_switch: "用户要求直接实施时需重出 CP5 或新 CR。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-18T17:55:00+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR093-LEDGER-HYGIENE-HLD-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T17:55:00+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP3-CR093-04, gate: CP3, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "broader source=cp8-follow-up missing tracking row warnings 是否本轮强修？", recommendation: "不强修，保持 warning-only；本轮只治理 CR019 / CR025 阻断项。", alternatives: ["本轮一起修所有 warnings", "全部 suppress"], pros_cons: "推荐方案控制范围；一起修会扩大到多个旧 CR；suppress 风险高。", impact_risk: "CP7 后可能仍有 warning，但不应阻断 CR019 / CR025 目标。", rollback_switch: "用户要求清 warning-only 项时另起后续 CR。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-18T17:55:00+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR093-LEDGER-HYGIENE-HLD-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T17:55:00+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR093-01, gate: CP2, decision_type: scope, question: "CR093 是否只治理 CR019 / CR025 相关历史账本与 cr-tracking 一致性？", recommendation: "是，仅覆盖静态账本、状态索引和检查器语义。", alternatives: ["扩大到 runtime / NAS 台账", "取消 CR093 保留旧账"], pros_cons: "推荐方案聚焦目标缺陷且风险低；扩大范围会混入高风险授权；取消会继续阻断检查。", impact_risk: "不处理交易业务或真实环境，只提升过程账本可靠性。", rollback_switch: "用户要求扩大范围时拆新 CR；用户 reject 时回到 follow-up backlog。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-18T17:45:00+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR093-LEDGER-HYGIENE-SCOPE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T17:45:00+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR093-02, gate: CP2, decision_type: implementation, question: "后续修复路线采用什么策略？", recommendation: "采用检查器语义修正 + 最小台账规范化：解析当前权威状态、接受等价 closed 状态、排除历史审计文本误扫。", alternatives: ["只改旧账本迎合旧检查器", "只 suppress 警告", "重写全量 checker"], pros_cons: "推荐方案能修根因且控制改动面；只改账本会保留误扫缺陷；suppress 风险较高；全量重写成本过大。", impact_risk: "CP5 后可能修改 checker、测试 fixture、CR019 follow-up tracking 和状态索引。", rollback_switch: "CP3/CP5 发现检查器结构不可控时降级为最小账本规范化。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-18T17:45:00+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR093-LEDGER-HYGIENE-SCOPE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T17:45:00+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR093-03, gate: CP2, decision_type: security, question: "CR093 是否继续禁止 runtime、NAS、凭据、账户、交易写和数据发布？", recommendation: "继续全部禁止。", alternatives: ["允许读取 NAS 台账", "允许执行 runtime smoke", "允许读取账户证据"], pros_cons: "推荐方案符合 ledger-only 范围；备选会引入外部状态和敏感边界。", impact_risk: "无外部副作用，避免把账本治理误扩展为运行授权。", rollback_switch: "用户明确授权外部动作时必须新建独立 runtime / NAS gate。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-18T17:45:00+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR093-LEDGER-HYGIENE-SCOPE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T17:45:00+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR093-04, gate: CP2, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受历史正文保留但 checker 不把历史审计文本当作当前缺陷？", recommendation: "接受；历史追溯保留，当前状态以权威字段 / 当前表格为准。", alternatives: ["删除历史片段", "继续全量文本扫描", "把所有旧状态统一改写"], pros_cons: "推荐方案兼顾追溯与检查准确性；删除历史会损失审计；全量扫描会继续误报。", impact_risk: "需要在设计中明确当前状态和历史审计文本的边界。", rollback_switch: "若审计要求必须全文扫描，则改为分层扫描并标注 audit-only。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-18T17:45:00+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR093-LEDGER-HYGIENE-SCOPE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T17:45:00+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR093-05, gate: CP2, decision_type: follow_up_tracking, question: "CR092-FU-02 runtime、CR091-FU-02 NAS、CR091-FU-03 order-write 如何处理？", recommendation: "全部保持候选，不随 CR093 启动。", alternatives: ["合并 runtime / NAS / order-write", "取消全部候选"], pros_cons: "推荐方案避免范围膨胀且保留后续路线；合并会扩大风险；取消会丢失 backlog。", impact_risk: "CR093 approve 只推进 ledger hygiene，不授权其他候选。", rollback_switch: "用户明确选择其他候选时另起独立 CR。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-18T17:45:00+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR093-LEDGER-HYGIENE-SCOPE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T17:45:00+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR091-01, gate: CP8, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受 CR091 当前 CP8 结论并关闭当前离线 runner 交付？", recommendation: "接受 READY_WITH_RISK，关闭 CR091 当前离线 runner 研究 / 设计 / 实现 / fixture 验证交付。", alternatives: ["补真实 runtime gate 后再关闭", "reject 回退到 CP7 pending CP8"], pros_cons: "推荐方案与 CP6/CP7 离线证据一致，能关闭结构缺口；补 runtime 会进入未授权 QMT/MiniQMT/XtQuant/gateway/runner 范围。", impact_risk: "关闭后仍不声明真实 QMT/MiniQMT/XtQuant/gateway/runner 可用。", rollback_switch: "用户要求补 runtime 证据或 reject 时回退到 CP7 / 新建 runtime gate。", status: accepted, answer: "同意，下一目标是什么？ at 2026-06-18T15:40:09+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR091-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T15:40:09+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR091-02, gate: CP8, decision_type: scope, question: "CR091 关闭范围是否限定为研究 / 设计 / 离线实现 / fixture 验证？", recommendation: "仅关闭离线 runner 合同、package/cache/adapters/fake transport、checker、fixtures/tests 和脱敏 evidence 切片。", alternatives: ["扩大到真实 QMT runner", "扩大到 NAS package exchange", "扩大到 submit/cancel"], pros_cons: "推荐方案边界清晰且符合已授权范围；备选均需要独立高风险门禁。", impact_risk: "后续真实运行、NAS 交换和订单写能力仍需新 CR。", rollback_switch: "用户要求扩大范围时暂停 CP8 并创建对应 CR。", status: accepted, answer: "同意，下一目标是什么？ at 2026-06-18T15:40:09+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR091-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T15:40:09+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR091-03, gate: CP8, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP8 approve 是否授权 QMT/MiniQMT/XtQuant/gateway/runner、NAS、凭据、账户或交易动作？", recommendation: "不授权；approve 仅接受交付就绪和风险，不授权任何 runtime / NAS / 凭据 / 账户 / 交易写动作。", alternatives: ["授权只读 runtime smoke", "授权 NAS package exchange", "授权 submit/cancel"], pros_cons: "推荐方案保持安全边界；备选均涉及外部状态、敏感信息或交易风险。", impact_risk: "无需访问交易主机、NAS、凭据或账户即可关闭当前离线交付。", rollback_switch: "需要真实运行时另起逐 run runtime_authorization gate。", status: accepted, answer: "同意，下一目标是什么？ at 2026-06-18T15:40:09+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR091-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T15:40:09+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR091-04, gate: CP8, decision_type: follow_up_tracking, question: "CR091 后续候选如何分流？", recommendation: "保留 runtime readonly smoke、NAS package exchange、order-write、ledger hygiene 为后续候选，不自动启动。", alternatives: ["本轮强制启动某个候选", "取消全部候选"], pros_cons: "推荐方案不扩大当前关闭范围且保留追溯；强制启动会绕过新门禁，取消会丢失后续路线。", impact_risk: "后续 backlog 存在但不阻断 CR091 当前交付关闭。", rollback_switch: "用户明确选择某个候选时再按 meta-flow 创建 / 恢复对应门禁。", status: accepted, answer: "同意，下一目标是什么？ at 2026-06-18T15:40:09+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR091-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T15:40:09+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR091-05, gate: CP8, decision_type: implementation, question: "是否接受当前无需额外用户手工 runtime 验证即可关闭离线切片？", recommendation: "接受；当前离线切片已通过自动化测试、checker、静态边界扫描和 CP7 PASS_WITH_RISK。", alternatives: ["要求交易主机手工验证后再关闭", "取消 runner 交付"], pros_cons: "推荐方案符合当前不授权 runtime 的边界；手工验证需新的运行授权，取消会丢失已完成合同能力。", impact_risk: "关闭结论只覆盖离线 runner，不证明交易主机可运行。", rollback_switch: "用户要求手工 runtime 验证时暂停 CP8 并创建 readonly smoke gate。", status: accepted, answer: "同意，下一目标是什么？ at 2026-06-18T15:40:09+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR091-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T15:40:09+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR091-01, gate: CP2, decision_type: scope, question: "CR091 当前是否启动为静态研究 / 方案 / 实施计划门禁？", recommendation: "启动 CR091 门禁，但 CP5 前不实现、不运行。", alternatives: ["暂停", "直接 CR047", "直接实现"], pros_cons: "推荐方案解决 runner 结构缺口且保留权限边界；直接实现会绕过设计门禁。", impact_risk: "不证明真实 runtime 可用。", rollback_switch: "用户要求先交付策略包时切 CR047。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-18T14:16:02+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR091-QMT-STRATEGY-RUNNER-SCOPE-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T14:16:02+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP3-CR091-02, gate: CP3, decision_type: architecture, question: "runner 主体路线是什么？", recommendation: "clean-room package-driven runner。", alternatives: ["改造 lite-qmt-executor", "接入 qmt-gateway/xqshare", "接入 vn.py", "仅手工脚本"], pros_cons: "推荐方案依赖少、边界清晰；外部项目实盘接口面过大。", impact_risk: "需要自行实现 package/cache/evidence。", rollback_switch: "未来复杂事件驱动需求出现时再评估 vn.py / Lean。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-18T14:16:02+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR091-QMT-STRATEGY-RUNNER-HLD-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T14:16:02+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP3-CR091-03, gate: CP3, decision_type: architecture, question: "多因子与其他策略如何兼容？", recommendation: "多因子优先，统一 StrategyAdapter 输出合同。", alternatives: ["多因子专用 runner", "每类策略各自 runner"], pros_cons: "推荐方案同时满足多因子优先和通用扩展；专用 runner 后续会分裂。", impact_risk: "adapter contract 需要稳定测试。", rollback_switch: "若多因子字段不稳定，先降级 legacy adapter。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-18T14:16:02+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR091-QMT-STRATEGY-RUNNER-HLD-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T14:16:02+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR091-04, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "首版产物形态是什么？", recommendation: "`trading/strategy_runner` 薄模块 + 离线 checker + fixtures/tests。", alternatives: ["只写脚本", "直接完整 runtime"], pros_cons: "推荐方案可复用且仍小范围；脚本方案扩展弱，runtime 方案越权。", impact_risk: "实现量高于单脚本。", rollback_switch: "若范围过大，可先交付 adapters + evidence 子集。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-18T14:16:02+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR091-QMT-STRATEGY-RUNNER-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T14:16:02+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR091-05, gate: CP5, decision_type: security, question: "runner 是否直接从 NAS 运行策略？", recommendation: "不直接运行；只读本地 immutable cache / active pointer。", alternatives: ["NAS 原地运行", "自动 pull/publish"], pros_cons: "推荐方案避免 NAS 和发布边界；备选需新 CR。", impact_risk: "后续需要单独处理包分发。", rollback_switch: "用户要求 NAS 自动取包时启动 CR093。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-18T14:16:02+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR091-QMT-STRATEGY-RUNNER-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T14:16:02+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR091-06, gate: CP5, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "首版是否允许真实 QMT runtime？", recommendation: "自动验证只允许 fake transport；真实只读 smoke 需后续逐 run 授权。", alternatives: ["立即连接 QMT", "完全取消只读 smoke"], pros_cons: "推荐方案保留验证路线但不越权。", impact_risk: "无真实 runtime ready 结论。", rollback_switch: "用户给出逐 run 授权后再开 runtime gate。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-18T14:16:02+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR091-QMT-STRATEGY-RUNNER-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T14:16:02+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR091-07, gate: CP5, decision_type: follow_up_tracking, question: "下单 / 撤单是否纳入 CR091？", recommendation: "不纳入，拆为 CR092 候选。", alternatives: ["纳入 CR091 后半段"], pros_cons: "推荐方案隔离 order write 风险；纳入会扩大门禁复杂度。", impact_risk: "CR091 不能验证下单链路。", rollback_switch: "用户明确要求订单写验证时启动 CR092。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-18T14:16:02+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR091-QMT-STRATEGY-RUNNER-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T14:16:02+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR091-08, gate: CP5, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受 CR091 首版不证明真实可交易？", recommendation: "接受；只证明 runner 合同和离线验证。", alternatives: ["要求真实交易机验证后才通过", "取消 runner"], pros_cons: "推荐方案符合当前权限；真实验证需要额外授权。", impact_risk: "CP8 仍可能是 READY_WITH_RISK。", rollback_switch: "用户拒绝风险时暂停或新增 runtime gate。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-18T14:16:02+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR091-QMT-STRATEGY-RUNNER-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T14:16:02+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR046-01, gate: CP8, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否接受 CR046 当前 CP8 结论？", recommendation: "接受 READY_WITH_RISK，关闭 framework-first 当前交付。", alternatives: ["补充验证后再关", "reject 回退到 CP7 pending CP8"], pros_cons: "推荐方案与 CP6/CP7 证据一致；补充验证会进入未授权 runtime 范围。", impact_risk: "剩余风险转为后续治理，不声明 runtime verified。", rollback_switch: "用户要求补证据或 reject 时回退。", status: accepted, answer: "同意，下一步做什么？准备好提示词和上下文，我会清除上下文 at 2026-06-18T07:59:20+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR046-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T07:59:20+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR046-02, gate: CP8, decision_type: scope, question: "CR046 关闭范围是否限定为文档 / 契约 / fixture / 静态验证？", recommendation: "是，仅关闭 framework-first 交付。", alternatives: ["扩大到具体策略", "扩大到 runner", "扩大到 runtime"], pros_cons: "推荐方案边界清晰；扩大范围需新设计和授权。", impact_risk: "具体策略和 runner 仍未交付。", rollback_switch: "用户明确要求扩大范围时另起 CR。", status: accepted, answer: "同意，下一步做什么？准备好提示词和上下文，我会清除上下文 at 2026-06-18T07:59:20+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR046-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T07:59:20+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR046-03, gate: CP8, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP8 approve 是否授权 QMT/MiniQMT/NAS/凭据/账户/交易动作？", recommendation: "不授权。", alternatives: ["授权只读连接", "授权 submit/cancel", "授权 NAS/package exchange"], pros_cons: "推荐方案符合当前安全边界；备选风险高且缺少门禁。", impact_risk: "后续真实验证仍 blocked。", rollback_switch: "需要真实动作时进入独立 runtime authorization。", status: accepted, answer: "同意，下一步做什么？准备好提示词和上下文，我会清除上下文 at 2026-06-18T07:59:20+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR046-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T07:59:20+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR046-04, gate: CP8, decision_type: implementation, question: "runner 未开发是否阻断 CR046 CP8？", recommendation: "不阻断；CR046 只冻结验证框架和后续 runner 路线，runner 实现交给后续 CR091 或等价 CR。", alternatives: ["要求先实现 runner", "取消 runner 路线"], pros_cons: "推荐方案避免把未授权实现混入框架收口；先实现 runner 会扩大范围。", impact_risk: "无法验证真实策略运行，不能声明 runtime ready。", rollback_switch: "用户要求立刻设计 / 实现 runner 时启动独立门禁。", status: accepted, answer: "同意，下一步做什么？准备好提示词和上下文，我会清除上下文 at 2026-06-18T07:59:20+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR046-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T07:59:20+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR046-05, gate: CP8, decision_type: follow_up_tracking, question: "后续候选如何处理？", recommendation: "保留 CR047/CR048/CR049/CR050 候选，CR089/CR091 保持 blocked，不自动启动。", alternatives: ["立即启动某个候选", "取消全部候选"], pros_cons: "推荐方案保留路线且不扩大执行面；立即启动需要新门禁。", impact_risk: "后续仍需用户明确选择。", rollback_switch: "用户指定候选时另起 CR / CP2。", status: accepted, answer: "同意，下一步做什么？准备好提示词和上下文，我会清除上下文 at 2026-06-18T07:59:20+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR046-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-18T07:59:20+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR089-01, gate: CP2, decision_type: scope, question: "是否正式进入 CR089 QMT 接口验证门禁材料阶段？", recommendation: "进入 CP2/CP3/CP5 材料阶段，但 CR089 保持 blocked，不设 active。", alternatives: ["合并到 CR046", "等待 CR046 CP8", "取消 CR089"], pros_cons: "推荐保留 QMT 接口验证路线且不破坏 active lock；备选更保守但推迟验证。", impact_risk: "CR046 仍持有 active lock，CR089 不会自动执行 runtime。", rollback_switch: "用户要求合并或等待时切换。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR089-QMT-INTERFACE-VALIDATION-BASELINE.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR089-02, gate: CP2, decision_type: scope, question: "本轮范围是否仅覆盖策略包 + 只读 smoke？", recommendation: "仅覆盖 package exchange、manifest、trading_pc intake 和 query_positions smoke。", alternatives: ["扩展 health/capabilities", "扩展 submit/cancel", "扩展 simulation"], pros_cons: "推荐权限最小；扩展项需要更高风险门禁。", impact_risk: "不覆盖交易写接口。", rollback_switch: "需要写接口时另起 high-risk gate。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR089-QMT-INTERFACE-VALIDATION-BASELINE.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR089-03, gate: CP2, decision_type: security, question: "CR020 是否可以恢复为验证入口？", recommendation: "不恢复；CR020 deleted-by-user，仅审计复用只读接口代码和 runbook 边界。", alternatives: ["恢复 CR020", "复制旧根 STATE"], pros_cons: "推荐符合 deleted-by-user；备选会污染当前状态。", impact_risk: "旧根 STATE 不得覆盖当前权威状态。", rollback_switch: "用户明确撤销 deleted-by-user 时另起治理。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR089-QMT-INTERFACE-VALIDATION-BASELINE.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR089-04, gate: CP2, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP2 是否授权 NAS/QMT/凭据/账户动作？", recommendation: "不授权，仅确认范围。", alternatives: ["CP2 直接授权 NAS pull", "授权 agent 代跑 QMT"], pros_cons: "推荐最小权限；备选越过门禁。", impact_risk: "无外部副作用。", rollback_switch: "需要真实动作时进入独立 runtime authorization。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR089-QMT-INTERFACE-VALIDATION-BASELINE.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR089-05, gate: CP2, decision_type: follow_up_tracking, question: "CR089 和 CR046 的关系如何登记？", recommendation: "CR089 继续登记为 blocked formal CR；CR046 保持 active-cp6-pass-ready-for-verification。", alternatives: ["CR089 改为 active", "关闭或恢复 CR046"], pros_cons: "推荐避免双 active；备选需要更大状态迁移。", impact_risk: "CR089 不会自动执行。", rollback_switch: "CR046 CP8 或用户要求状态切换时重审。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR089-QMT-INTERFACE-VALIDATION-BASELINE.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP3-CR089-01, gate: CP3, decision_type: architecture, question: "NAS 是否作为默认执行根？", recommendation: "不作为执行根，仅作为 package exchange。", alternatives: ["NAS 原地执行", "人工 U 盘", "Git release"], pros_cons: "推荐减少网络抖动和半写入风险；NAS 原地执行简单但脆弱。", impact_risk: "需要交易主机本地缓存。", rollback_switch: "用户要求临时 smoke 原地读取时另列例外。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR089-QMT-INTERFACE-VALIDATION-HLD-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP3-CR089-02, gate: CP3, decision_type: architecture, question: "策略包结构如何确定？", recommendation: "使用 zip + sha256 + manifest.yaml + docs + validation，包含 targets/qmt_terminal 和 targets/miniqmt_runner。", alternatives: ["只放单文件脚本", "只放 wheel", "仅 Git tag"], pros_cons: "推荐可审计；单文件不可追溯。", impact_risk: "需要 manifest 校验。", rollback_switch: "目标平台变化时扩展 manifest。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR089-QMT-INTERFACE-VALIDATION-HLD-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP3-CR089-03, gate: CP3, decision_type: architecture, question: "交易主机如何落地 package？", recommendation: "校验后复制到 TRADING_PACKAGE_CACHE_ROOT/packages/<id>/<version>，active symlink 指向当前版本。", alternatives: ["每次直接从 NAS 运行", "覆盖同名目录"], pros_cons: "推荐不可变缓存和可回滚；覆盖目录风险高。", impact_risk: "需要本地磁盘空间。", rollback_switch: "缓存空间不足时停止。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR089-QMT-INTERFACE-VALIDATION-HLD-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP3-CR089-04, gate: CP3, decision_type: implementation, question: "index / approval / quarantine 如何设计？", recommendation: "使用 index/package-index.yaml、approvals/*.yaml、quarantine/<package_id>/rejection.yaml。", alternatives: ["只靠文件名约定", "人工口头审批"], pros_cons: "推荐可审计；口头审批不可追踪。", impact_risk: "多一个审批文件。", rollback_switch: "简化 smoke 可保留 approval stub。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR089-QMT-INTERFACE-VALIDATION-HLD-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP3-CR089-05, gate: CP3, decision_type: security, question: "qmt_interface_smoke 能否含交易写入能力？", recommendation: "不允许，只含 manifest/checksum/target check 和授权后的 query_positions。", alternatives: ["包含 submit/cancel 测试", "包含 simulation"], pros_cons: "推荐权限最小；备选高风险。", impact_risk: "不验证交易写接口。", rollback_switch: "需要写接口时另起 high-risk gate。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR089-QMT-INTERFACE-VALIDATION-HLD-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP3-CR089-06, gate: CP3, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "如何处理 endpoint matrix 语义冲突？", recommendation: "接受为 CP5/实现前风险；不在本门禁改代码。", alternatives: ["立即改 query_positions 默认阻断优先级", "忽略冲突"], pros_cons: "推荐先决策再改；立即改可能破坏 CR020 测试。", impact_risk: "后续实现前必须重审。", rollback_switch: "CP5/实现阶段确认语义后再修。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR089-QMT-INTERFACE-VALIDATION-HLD-REVIEW.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR089-01, gate: CP5, decision_type: implementation, question: "后续是否允许准备本地离线策略包骨架？", recommendation: "允许仅在本地工作区生成/整理 qmt_interface_smoke package skeleton 和 manifest/checksum 说明。", alternatives: ["只保留文档", "直接发布到 NAS"], pros_cons: "推荐可验证 package 合同；直接 NAS 风险高。", impact_risk: "不触碰 NAS。", rollback_switch: "需要 NAS publish 时另起授权。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR089-QMT-INTERFACE-VALIDATION-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR089-02, gate: CP5, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "是否授权 agent 运行 QMT/MiniQMT？", recommendation: "不授权；真实接口由用户手工运行。", alternatives: ["授权 agent 代跑", "授权远程 trading_pc 执行"], pros_cons: "推荐最小权限；代跑涉及凭据和账户。", impact_risk: "自动化程度较低。", rollback_switch: "用户明确授予 runtime 环境与脱敏策略时重审。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR089-QMT-INTERFACE-VALIDATION-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR089-03, gate: CP5, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "是否授权 NAS 操作？", recommendation: "不授权 NAS publish/pull/list/copy/delete；只保留路径合同。", alternatives: ["授权 publish", "授权 pull", "授权 listing"], pros_cons: "推荐不接触外部存储；备选可直接验证 exchange。", impact_risk: "NAS 实际状态未知。", rollback_switch: "用户提供明确路径和授权时另起门禁。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR089-QMT-INTERFACE-VALIDATION-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR089-04, gate: CP5, decision_type: security, question: "smoke 证据如何回填？", recommendation: "只回填脱敏摘要：run_id、endpoint_id、status、position_count、auth_status、redaction_status。", alternatives: ["粘贴原始 positions", "上传日志"], pros_cons: "推荐保护账户隐私；原始证据风险高。", impact_risk: "证据可诊断性较弱。", rollback_switch: "需要深度诊断时先脱敏。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR089-QMT-INTERFACE-VALIDATION-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR089-05, gate: CP5, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "endpoint matrix 冲突如何处理？", recommendation: "接受为后续实现前风险，不在本门禁改代码。", alternatives: ["立即修复", "忽略"], pros_cons: "推荐避免破坏 CR020 特例；忽略会遗留歧义。", impact_risk: "后续实现需明确 failure precedence。", rollback_switch: "用户要求实现时先开语义决策。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR089-QMT-INTERFACE-VALIDATION-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR089-06, gate: CP5, decision_type: security, question: "是否允许 submit/cancel/simulation/live？", recommendation: "全部不允许。", alternatives: ["允许 simulation", "允许小额 live", "允许 cancel dry-run"], pros_cons: "推荐保护交易安全；备选高风险。", impact_risk: "不验证交易写入接口。", rollback_switch: "需要时另起 high-risk gate。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR089-QMT-INTERFACE-VALIDATION-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR089-07, gate: CP5, decision_type: follow_up_tracking, question: "CP5 approve 后 CR089 状态如何处理？", recommendation: "保持 blocked-readiness-approved；等待 CR046 active lock 或后续 runtime authorization。", alternatives: ["改为 active", "关闭 CR089", "合并 CR046"], pros_cons: "推荐避免双 active；备选需要状态迁移。", impact_risk: "不能自动进入 runtime。", rollback_switch: "用户要求实际运行时重启门禁。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR089-QMT-INTERFACE-VALIDATION-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T21:34:53+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR086-01, gate: CP8, decision_type: risk_acceptance, question: "是否关闭 CR086 当前交付？", recommendation: "关闭为 closed-current-delivery / READY_WITH_RISK。", alternatives: ["补额外验证后再关闭", "回退状态收敛"], pros_cons: "推荐与执行证据一致；备选会继续保留状态噪音。", impact_risk: "CR073/CR074 后续治理风险仍存在。", rollback_switch: "用户要求补证据或回退时切换。", status: accepted, answer: "同意，下一步做什么？ at 2026-06-17T16:02:06+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR086-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T16:02:06+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR086-02, gate: CP8, decision_type: follow_up_tracking, question: "后续候选如何处理？", recommendation: "保留 CR026、NAS compare、provider rebuild、CR027、CR028 和未来 root/data/runtime/remote archive 为候选 / spike，不启动。", alternatives: ["同时启动某个候选", "取消全部候选"], pros_cons: "推荐不扩大范围；备选需要新门禁或丢失追踪。", impact_risk: "Backlog 仍存在但不阻断本轮。", rollback_switch: "用户明确选择候选时另起 CR。", status: accepted, answer: "同意，下一步做什么？ at 2026-06-17T16:02:06+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR086-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T16:02:06+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP8-CR086-03, gate: CP8, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP8 是否授权外部动作？", recommendation: "不授权，仅关闭 ledger-only 交付。", alternatives: ["授权 remote Git", "授权 .env", "授权 data/NAS/runtime 或 cleanup"], pros_cons: "推荐符合本轮 scope；备选扩大安全面。", impact_risk: "无外部副作用。", rollback_switch: "需要外部动作时另起 gate。", status: accepted, answer: "同意，下一步做什么？ at 2026-06-17T16:02:06+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR086-DELIVERY-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T16:02:06+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR084-01, gate: CP2, decision_type: scope, question: "是否正式启动 CR084 remote target configuration / push execution gate？", recommendation: "启动 CR084；先完成 CP2/CP3/CP5 决策，不默认执行远端动作。", alternatives: ["暂停远端发布", "恢复 CR046", "直接 push"], pros_cons: "推荐方案可审计且风险最小；直接 push 外部写入风险高。", impact_risk: "远端仍不变，发布未完成。", rollback_switch: "reject 时保持 CR083 closed；修改时重写门禁。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T12:42:37+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR084-REMOTE-TARGET-BASELINE.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T12:42:37+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR084-02, gate: CP2, decision_type: implementation, question: "是否以 d4d2881 作为唯一候选发布 baseline？", recommendation: "是，仅围绕 d4d2881 做 target / push gate。", alternatives: ["先提交 dirty worktree", "改用其他 commit"], pros_cons: "推荐边界清晰；纳入 dirty worktree 会扩大范围。", impact_risk: "未提交文件不会发布。", rollback_switch: "用户要求扩大 commit 范围时另起 commit gate。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T12:42:37+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR084-REMOTE-TARGET-BASELINE.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T12:42:37+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR084-03, gate: CP2, decision_type: security, question: "remote URL 是否必须由用户明确提供或确认？", recommendation: "是；不得从历史 remote、记忆或旧 GitHub 发布记录推断。", alternatives: ["复用历史远端", "由 agent 自动猜测"], pros_cons: "推荐防止误推；备选可能推错仓库。", impact_risk: "需要用户提供 URL 或明确确认。", rollback_switch: "URL 未提供时 CR084 停止等待。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T12:42:37+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR084-REMOTE-TARGET-BASELINE.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T12:42:37+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR084-04, gate: CP2, decision_type: runtime_authorization, question: "CP2 是否授权 git ls-remote、remote add、set-upstream 或 push？", recommendation: "不授权；这些动作后置到 CP5。", alternatives: ["CP2 即授权全部动作", "只授权 ls-remote"], pros_cons: "推荐先决策后动作；备选扩大执行面。", impact_risk: "CP2 仍不改变外部状态。", rollback_switch: "CP5 approve 后按单项执行。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T12:42:37+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR084-REMOTE-TARGET-BASELINE.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T12:42:37+08:00"}
  - {id: DQ-CP2-CR084-05, gate: CP2, decision_type: security, question: "default branch、tag、force push、history rewrite 是否在范围内？", recommendation: "全部不在范围内。", alternatives: ["纳入默认分支治理", "允许 tag", "允许 force/rewrite"], pros_cons: "推荐保护远端历史；备选风险高。", impact_risk: "不解决默认分支治理。", rollback_switch: "需要时另起 high-risk gate。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T12:42:37+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR084-REMOTE-TARGET-BASELINE.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T12:42:37+08:00"}

  - {id: DQ-CP5-CR084-10, gate: CP5, decision_type: follow_up_tracking, question: "external process Git/NAS 与 CR046 如何处理？", recommendation: "全部不处理；CR046 保持 paused，external process 另起治理。", alternatives: ["同步治理 process", "恢复 CR046"], pros_cons: "推荐避免混合风险。", impact_risk: "后续治理仍未完成。", rollback_switch: "需要时另起独立 CR。", status: accepted, answer: "同意 at 2026-06-17T12:42:37+08:00", source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR084-REMOTE-TARGET-READINESS.md, owner_agent: host-orchestrator, updated_at: "2026-06-17T12:42:37+08:00"}
  - id: DQ-CP5-CR078-01
    gate: CP5
    decision_type: implementation
    question: staged process/** removals 是否提交？
    recommendation: CP5 approve 后允许把 1572 个 staged removals 纳入一次本地 scoped commit。
    alternatives:
    - 保持 staged
    - 恢复 removals
    - 拆分提交
    pros_cons: 推荐方案固化 CR081/CR082 外部化事实；保持 staged 会继续污染工作区；恢复会撤销外部化 Git 证据。
    impact_risk: 删除的是 Git 跟踪关系，不删除 external process ledger。
    rollback_switch: 失败时停止并报告；reject 时不提交。
    status: accepted
    answer: approve at 2026-06-17T10:30:39+08:00
    source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR078-GIT-PUBLICATION-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP5-CR078-02
    gate: CP5
    decision_type: implementation
    question: .gitignore、LEDGER.md、ledger.yaml、scripts/link-engineering-ledger.sh 是否和 process removals 同提交？
    recommendation: 同一 scoped commit 纳入，保证 process 外部化可恢复。
    alternatives:
    - 单独提交
    - 暂不纳入
    pros_cons: 推荐方案保持恢复闭环；拆开会产生中间不可恢复状态。
    impact_risk: 影响新 clone bootstrap。
    rollback_switch: 用户指定拆分时调整 allowlist。
    status: accepted
    answer: approve at 2026-06-17T10:30:39+08:00
    source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR078-GIT-PUBLICATION-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP5-CR078-03
    gate: CP5
    decision_type: implementation
    question: CR081/CR082 quality / release / release-context docs 是否纳入？
    recommendation: 纳入 docs/quality 与 docs/release 的 CR081/CR082 文档；process/release release-context 保留在 external process ledger，不 force-add 到 quant-lab Git。
    alternatives:
    - 全部不纳入
    - force-add process/release
    - 纳入所有历史 release docs
    pros_cons: 推荐方案兼顾审计和外部化边界；force-add 会破坏 /process ignore。
    impact_risk: 影响发布证据可见性。
    rollback_switch: 用户要求 release-context 入业务 Git 时重提 DQ。
    status: accepted
    answer: approve at 2026-06-17T10:30:39+08:00
    source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR078-GIT-PUBLICATION-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP5-CR078-04
    gate: CP5
    decision_type: runtime_authorization
    question: 是否允许 git add allowlist 和 git commit？
    recommendation: 允许一次 allowlist git add 与一次本地 git commit，提交消息限定 CR078 process ledger publication gate。
    alternatives:
    - 不允许 commit
    - 允许多 commit
    pros_cons: 推荐方案给 staged removals 收敛出口；不 commit 会继续悬空。
    impact_risk: 改变本地 Git history。
    rollback_switch: commit 前复核 allowlist；失败即停止。
    status: accepted
    answer: approve at 2026-06-17T10:30:39+08:00
    source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR078-GIT-PUBLICATION-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP5-CR078-05
    gate: CP5
    decision_type: runtime_authorization
    question: 是否允许 git push？
    recommendation: 不授权 push；commit 后展示证据再二次确认。
    alternatives:
    - 同时授权 push 当前分支
    - push 到指定远端/分支
    pros_cons: 推荐方案减少远端风险；备选会改变外部状态。
    impact_risk: 避免误推到错误分支。
    rollback_switch: 用户明确授权 push 时切换。
    status: accepted
    answer: approve at 2026-06-17T10:30:39+08:00
    source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR078-GIT-PUBLICATION-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP5-CR078-06
    gate: CP5
    decision_type: security
    question: remote URL、默认分支、tag、force push、history rewrite 是否允许？
    recommendation: 全部不授权；不读取或修改 remote URL，不做 default branch、tag、force 或 rewrite。
    alternatives:
    - 允许 default branch
    - 允许 tag
    - 允许 force/rewrite
    pros_cons: 推荐方案保护远端历史；备选不可逆风险高。
    impact_risk: 远端治理保持未完成。
    rollback_switch: 独立高风险门禁后切换。
    status: accepted
    answer: approve at 2026-06-17T10:30:39+08:00
    source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR078-GIT-PUBLICATION-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP5-CR078-07
    gate: CP5
    decision_type: follow_up_tracking
    question: 外部 /home/hyde/workspace/process 如何治理？
    recommendation: 本轮只保留本地 external process ledger；单独 CR 决定 Git-only、NAS-only 或 Git+NAS。
    alternatives:
    - 本轮 git init
    - 本轮 NAS-only
    - 本轮 Git+NAS
    pros_cons: 推荐方案不扩大权限；备选需外部 project / NAS 策略。
    impact_risk: 外部 process 暂无远端备份决策。
    rollback_switch: 用户另起 external process governance CR。
    status: accepted
    answer: approve at 2026-06-17T10:30:39+08:00
    source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR078-GIT-PUBLICATION-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP5-CR078-08
    gate: CP5
    decision_type: implementation
    question: 当前分支 work/chapter3-factor-gap-remediation-20260608 是否作为本地提交落点？
    recommendation: 若允许 commit，只在当前分支本地提交；不切换分支，不 rebase/merge。
    alternatives:
    - 切 master/main
    - 新建 publication branch
    - 先停止确认目标分支
    pros_cons: 推荐方案不改变分支状态；备选可能触发 merge/rebase 风险。
    impact_risk: 当前分支名与 publication 语义不完全一致。
    rollback_switch: 用户要求目标分支时先停止并重提门禁。
    status: accepted
    answer: approve at 2026-06-17T10:30:39+08:00
    source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR078-GIT-PUBLICATION-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP8-CR082-01
    gate: CP8
    decision_type: risk_acceptance
    question: 是否接受 CR082 READY_WITH_RISK 并关闭当前 namespace normalization 交付？
    recommendation: 接受并关闭 CR082 为 closed-current-delivery / READY_WITH_RISK。
    alternatives:
    - 保持 active
    - reject 并回退
    pros_cons: 推荐方案收敛已完成迁移；保持 active 会让完成项长期占用状态。
    impact_risk: 接受 R-CR082-001..03。
    rollback_switch: reject 时保持 active-cp8-review-pending。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR082-DELIVERY-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP8-CR082-02
    gate: CP8
    decision_type: scope
    question: CR082 关闭范围是否只覆盖 project namespace normalization？
    recommendation: 限定为 /home/hyde/workspace/process/quant-lab、process -> ../process/quant-lab、README、pointer files 和 release docs。
    alternatives:
    - 同时做 CR078
    - 同时做 cleanup
    pros_cons: 推荐方案符合当前授权；备选扩大影响面。
    impact_risk: remote Git 未治理，backup 未删除。
    rollback_switch: 需要 remote 或 cleanup 时另起 CR。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR082-DELIVERY-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP8-CR082-03
    gate: CP8
    decision_type: security
    question: CP8 approve 是否继续不授权 data/reports、凭据、NAS 内容、provider/lake/catalog、runtime、remote write 和 cleanup？
    recommendation: 继续不授权，相关事项均需独立 CR。
    alternatives:
    - 同时授权 remote commit/push
    - 同时授权 cleanup
    pros_cons: 推荐方案保持最小权限；备选改变外部或破坏性状态。
    impact_risk: 防止数据、凭据、外部写入和 runtime 风险。
    rollback_switch: 用户另起具体操作 CR 时切换。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR082-DELIVERY-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP8-CR082-04
    gate: CP8
    decision_type: implementation
    question: process/** staged removals 如何处理？
    recommendation: 保持 staged state，暂不 commit/push，等待 CR078。
    alternatives:
    - 立即 commit
    - restore staged removals
    pros_cons: 推荐方案避免远端写入；立即 commit 超出本轮授权。
    impact_risk: Git status 会继续显示大量 staged deletions。
    rollback_switch: 用户明确 CR078 Git 策略后处理。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR082-DELIVERY-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP8-CR082-05
    gate: CP8
    decision_type: follow_up_tracking
    question: CR082 后续事项如何分流？
    recommendation: CR078 remote governance 优先，CR077 old root retirement 保留，不自动启动。
    alternatives:
    - 立即启动 CR078
    - 暂停全部后续项
    pros_cons: 推荐方案保留追踪且不扩大 CP8 范围。
    impact_risk: 后续仍需人工决策。
    rollback_switch: 用户明确要求时启动对应 CR。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR082-DELIVERY-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP2-CR082-01
    gate: CP2
    decision_type: scope
    question: 是否正式启动 CR082 project namespace normalization？
    recommendation: 启动 CR082，范围限定为 external process ledger 项目命名空间和指针更新。
    alternatives:
    - 不启动
    - 合并到 CR078
    pros_cons: 推荐方案先修正结构边界；合并到 CR078 会把结构治理和远端治理耦合。
    impact_risk: CR082 将占用当前下一步执行队列。
    rollback_switch: reject 时保持 CR081 flat root 结果。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR082-PROCESS-LEDGER-NAMESPACE-BASELINE.md
  - id: DQ-CP2-CR082-02
    gate: CP2
    decision_type: scope
    question: 项目归档目标目录是否采用 /home/hyde/workspace/process/quant-lab？
    recommendation: 采用 process/quant-lab/ 作为 quant-lab 项目过程文件根。
    alternatives:
    - 采用 process/projects/quant-lab/
    - 继续 flat root
    pros_cons: 推荐方案短路径且与用户示例一致；备选更通用但多一层。
    impact_risk: 影响 symlink、README 和恢复脚本路径。
    rollback_switch: 用户指定其他命名空间时重写路径。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR082-PROCESS-LEDGER-NAMESPACE-BASELINE.md
  - id: DQ-CP2-CR082-03
    gate: CP2
    decision_type: implementation
    question: 现有 flat root 如何处理？
    recommendation: 执行阶段仅搬入 quant-lab/ 并保留必要 root README；不删除 CR081 backup。
    alternatives:
    - 保留 flat root 内容副本
    - 立即清理旧层
    pros_cons: 推荐方案减少重复且保留回退材料；立即清理风险高。
    impact_risk: 可能需要更新 root README 防止误读。
    rollback_switch: 验证失败时恢复 flat root symlink。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR082-PROCESS-LEDGER-NAMESPACE-BASELINE.md
  - id: DQ-CP2-CR082-04
    gate: CP2
    decision_type: follow_up_tracking
    question: CR082 与 CR078 的顺序如何安排？
    recommendation: CR082 先于 CR078，完成 namespace 后再进入 remote Git governance。
    alternatives:
    - 先做 CR078
    - 取消 CR078
    pros_cons: 推荐方案避免远端固化 flat root；先 CR078 会增加后续迁移成本。
    impact_risk: CR078 延后，但边界更清晰。
    rollback_switch: 用户要求直接发布时切回 CR078。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR082-PROCESS-LEDGER-NAMESPACE-BASELINE.md
  - id: DQ-CP2-CR082-05
    gate: CP2
    decision_type: security
    question: CP2 approve 是否继续不授权 data/reports、凭据、NAS 内容、remote write、runtime 和 cleanup？
    recommendation: 继续不授权，相关事项均需独立 CR 或明确运行授权。
    alternatives:
    - 同时授权 Git commit/push
    - 同时授权 NAS 管理
    pros_cons: 推荐方案保持最小权限；备选扩大外部写入面。
    impact_risk: 防止数据、凭据、远端和 runtime 风险。
    rollback_switch: 用户另起具体操作 CR 时切换。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR082-PROCESS-LEDGER-NAMESPACE-BASELINE.md
  - id: DQ-CP3-CR082-01
    gate: CP3
    decision_type: architecture
    question: external process project 是否采用多项目容器结构？
    recommendation: /home/hyde/workspace/process 作为容器，quant-lab/ 作为项目目录。
    alternatives:
    - flat root
    - projects/quant-lab
    pros_cons: 推荐方案直接满足分项目归档；flat root 不满足目标。
    impact_risk: 后续项目可同级归档。
    rollback_switch: 用户指定更深层路径时重写设计。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR082-PROCESS-LEDGER-NAMESPACE-DESIGN-REVIEW.md
  - id: DQ-CP3-CR082-02
    gate: CP3
    decision_type: architecture
    question: quant-lab 内是否承载当前全部过程目录？
    recommendation: 将当前 STATE.md、changes/、checks/、checkpoints/ 等搬入 quant-lab/。
    alternatives:
    - 只搬 changes/
    - 只新增 README
    pros_cons: 推荐方案保持 process 入口语义完整；部分搬迁会产生双源。
    impact_risk: 影响所有 process/... 相对路径。
    rollback_switch: 验证失败时回退 flat root。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR082-PROCESS-LEDGER-NAMESPACE-DESIGN-REVIEW.md
  - id: DQ-CP3-CR082-03
    gate: CP3
    decision_type: implementation
    question: 主项目 process 软链接目标是否切到 ../process/quant-lab？
    recommendation: 执行阶段原子替换为 ../process/quant-lab。
    alternatives:
    - 保持 ../process
    - 使用绝对 symlink
    pros_cons: 推荐方案保持项目入口稳定且可移植；绝对链接迁移性差。
    impact_risk: 影响脚本和人工查阅入口。
    rollback_switch: link check 失败时恢复 ../process。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR082-PROCESS-LEDGER-NAMESPACE-DESIGN-REVIEW.md
  - id: DQ-CP3-CR082-04
    gate: CP3
    decision_type: implementation
    question: 指针文件如何更新？
    recommendation: 更新 LEDGER.md、ledger.yaml、scripts/link-engineering-ledger.sh 到 process/quant-lab。
    alternatives:
    - 只更新 README
    - 暂不更新脚本
    pros_cons: 推荐方案保证 clone 恢复可用；只更新 README 会留下脚本漂移。
    impact_risk: 影响后续 bootstrap。
    rollback_switch: 验证脚本失败则回退指针。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR082-PROCESS-LEDGER-NAMESPACE-DESIGN-REVIEW.md
  - id: DQ-CP3-CR082-05
    gate: CP3
    decision_type: follow_up_tracking
    question: 是否定义 future project namespace 约定？
    recommendation: root README 说明未来项目使用 /home/hyde/workspace/process/<project-name>/，由各项目各自软链进入。
    alternatives:
    - 不定义
    - 等下一个项目再决定
    pros_cons: 推荐方案避免再次变更；不定义会重复讨论。
    impact_risk: 不自动创建其他项目目录。
    rollback_switch: 未来项目有特殊要求时另行覆盖。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR082-PROCESS-LEDGER-NAMESPACE-DESIGN-REVIEW.md
  - id: DQ-CP5-CR082-01
    gate: CP5
    decision_type: runtime_authorization
    question: CP5 approve 后是否授权受控 namespace move？
    recommendation: 授权 post-approval preflight 通过后执行 process/* -> process/quant-lab/ 的受控移动。
    alternatives:
    - 只做 dry-run
    - 不执行
    pros_cons: 推荐方案完成用户目标；dry-run 会留下 flat root。
    impact_risk: 文件路径变化，需严格验证。
    rollback_switch: preflight 失败则不执行。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR082-PROCESS-LEDGER-NAMESPACE-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP5-CR082-02
    gate: CP5
    decision_type: implementation
    question: 是否授权更新 quant-lab 项目 symlink？
    recommendation: 授权将 /home/hyde/workspace/quant-lab/process 切换到 ../process/quant-lab。
    alternatives:
    - 保持 ../process
    - 创建第二个 symlink
    pros_cons: 推荐方案让项目入口直达项目目录；第二个 symlink 增加混乱。
    impact_risk: 影响日常查阅入口。
    rollback_switch: link check 失败则恢复 ../process。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR082-PROCESS-LEDGER-NAMESPACE-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP5-CR082-03
    gate: CP5
    decision_type: implementation
    question: 是否授权更新 README 和指针文件？
    recommendation: 更新 root README、project README、LEDGER.md、ledger.yaml、scripts/link-engineering-ledger.sh。
    alternatives:
    - 只更新 README
    - 只更新 symlink
    pros_cons: 推荐方案消除路径漂移；部分更新会影响 clone 恢复。
    impact_risk: 影响后续 CR078 发布内容。
    rollback_switch: 验证失败则回退指针。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR082-PROCESS-LEDGER-NAMESPACE-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP5-CR082-04
    gate: CP5
    decision_type: risk_acceptance
    question: 是否接受 staged process/** removals 在 CR082 后继续不提交？
    recommendation: 接受继续保留 staged removals，等待 CR078 remote governance 统一处理。
    alternatives:
    - 立即 commit
    - restore staged removals
    pros_cons: 推荐方案避免未授权远端写入；restore 会干扰外部化事实。
    impact_risk: Git status 仍会显示大量 staged deletions。
    rollback_switch: 用户启动 CR078 后处理。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR082-PROCESS-LEDGER-NAMESPACE-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP5-CR082-05
    gate: CP5
    decision_type: follow_up_tracking
    question: CR082 完成后的下一步是否回到 CR078？
    recommendation: CR082 CP8 关闭后优先启动 CR078 remote Git governance / publication gate。
    alternatives:
    - 启动 old root retirement
    - 暂停全部后续 CR
    pros_cons: 推荐方案处理当前最明显 Git 边界问题；old root retirement 仍未就绪。
    impact_risk: 后续仍需人工门禁。
    rollback_switch: 用户指定其他优先级时调整。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR082-PROCESS-LEDGER-NAMESPACE-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP8-CR081-01
    gate: CP8
    decision_type: risk_acceptance
    question: 是否接受 CR081 READY_WITH_RISK 并关闭当前 process ledger externalization 交付？
    recommendation: 接受并关闭 CR081 为 closed-current-delivery / READY_WITH_RISK。
    alternatives:
    - 保持 active
    - reject 并回退到 cutover 后待确认状态
    pros_cons: 推荐方案收敛已完成迁移；保持 active 会让完成项长期占用状态。
    impact_risk: 接受 R-CR081-001..03。
    rollback_switch: reject 时保持 active-cutover-complete-cp8-pending。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR081-DELIVERY-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP8-CR081-02
    gate: CP8
    decision_type: scope
    question: CR081 关闭范围是否只覆盖 process/ 外部化和 symlink cutover？
    recommendation: 限定为 /home/hyde/workspace/process、process -> ../process、README、bootstrap 和 Git index boundary。
    alternatives:
    - 同时迁移 docs/*
    - 同时做 remote governance
    pros_cons: 推荐方案符合第一阶段范围；备选扩大影响面。
    impact_risk: docs 过程文件仍在当前项目，remote Git 未治理。
    rollback_switch: 需要 docs 外部化或 remote governance 时另起 CR。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR081-DELIVERY-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP8-CR081-03
    gate: CP8
    decision_type: security
    question: CP8 approve 是否继续不授权 data/reports、凭据、NAS 内容、provider/lake/catalog、runtime、remote write 和 cleanup？
    recommendation: 继续不授权，相关事项均需独立 CR。
    alternatives:
    - 同时授权 remote commit/push
    - 同时授权 cleanup
    pros_cons: 推荐方案保持最小权限；备选改变外部或破坏性状态。
    impact_risk: 防止数据、凭据、外部写入和 runtime 风险。
    rollback_switch: 用户另起具体操作 CR 时切换。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR081-DELIVERY-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP8-CR081-04
    gate: CP8
    decision_type: implementation
    question: process/** staged removals 如何处理？
    recommendation: 保持 staged state，暂不 commit/push，等待后续 Git governance 或用户提交决策。
    alternatives:
    - 立即 commit
    - restore staged removals
    pros_cons: 推荐方案保留迁移事实且避免远端写入；立即 commit 超出本轮授权；restore 会回退外部化边界。
    impact_risk: Git status 会显示大量 staged deletions。
    rollback_switch: 用户明确 Git commit/push 策略后处理。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR081-DELIVERY-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP8-CR081-05
    gate: CP8
    decision_type: follow_up_tracking
    question: CR081 后续事项如何分流？
    recommendation: CR078 remote governance、CR077 old root retirement、可选 docs externalization 保留且不自动启动。
    alternatives:
    - 立即启动其中一项
    - 取消全部后续项
    pros_cons: 推荐方案保留追踪且不扩大当前范围。
    impact_risk: 后续仍需人工决策。
    rollback_switch: 用户明确要求时启动对应 CR。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR081-DELIVERY-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP2-CR081-01
    gate: CP2
    decision_type: scope
    question: 是否正式启动 CR081？
    recommendation: 启动 CR081，并按 high-risk standard 门禁处理。
    alternatives:
    - 保持讨论态
    - 取消外部化路线
    pros_cons: 推荐方案将目标纳入可审计 CR；保持讨论态不会解决过程文件 owner 问题。
    impact_risk: 新增正式 CR 和待审门禁。
    rollback_switch: reject 时关闭为 cancelled 或保留候选。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR081-PROCESS-LEDGER-EXTERNALIZATION-BASELINE.md
  - id: DQ-CP2-CR081-02
    gate: CP2
    decision_type: scope
    question: 本轮第一阶段是否只迁移 process/？
    recommendation: 第一阶段仅处理 process/；docs/design、docs/features、docs/quality、docs/release deferred。
    alternatives:
    - 同时迁移 docs
    - 完全不迁移只做镜像
    pros_cons: 推荐方案风险最低；同时迁移 docs 会扩大 owner 边界。
    impact_risk: docs 过程证据仍暂留当前项目。
    rollback_switch: CP8 后另起 docs externalization CR。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR081-PROCESS-LEDGER-EXTERNALIZATION-BASELINE.md
  - id: DQ-CP2-CR081-03
    gate: CP2
    decision_type: architecture
    question: 外部过程项目是否成为 process/** 唯一 owner？
    recommendation: 是；本项目只保留本地入口。
    alternatives:
    - 只做外部备份
    - 长期双写并存
    pros_cons: 推荐方案职责清晰；双写长期容易漂移。
    impact_risk: clone 后需 bootstrap 软链接。
    rollback_switch: symlink 断链时回退到项目内 process backup。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR081-PROCESS-LEDGER-EXTERNALIZATION-BASELINE.md
  - id: DQ-CP2-CR081-04
    gate: CP2
    decision_type: security
    question: 是否继续禁止 data/reports、NAS 内容、凭据和 runtime？
    recommendation: 继续禁止，本 CR 只处理 process ledger。
    alternatives:
    - 同时纳入 NAS 内容体检
    - 同时恢复 CR046
    pros_cons: 推荐方案维持最小权限；备选跨越敏感数据和 runtime。
    impact_risk: 不验证 NAS 内容或数据文件。
    rollback_switch: 需要 NAS/data/runtime 时另起 CR。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR081-PROCESS-LEDGER-EXTERNALIZATION-BASELINE.md
  - id: DQ-CP2-CR081-05
    gate: CP2
    decision_type: runtime_authorization
    question: CP2 approve 是否授权执行迁移？
    recommendation: 不授权；必须 CP2/CP3/CP5 全部 approved 后才允许 preflight 和 cutover。
    alternatives:
    - CP2 后立即执行
    - 一次性授权全部后续动作
    pros_cons: 推荐方案符合关键门控；备选边界过宽。
    impact_risk: 防止范围批准被误读为执行许可。
    rollback_switch: 三门通过后进入 controlled preflight。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR081-PROCESS-LEDGER-EXTERNALIZATION-BASELINE.md
  - id: DQ-CP3-CR081-01
    gate: CP3
    decision_type: architecture
    question: 外部过程项目路径模型如何定义？
    recommendation: 使用 ${ENGINEERING_LEDGER_ROOT:-/home/hyde/workspace/engineering-ledger}/projects/quant-lab/process。
    alternatives:
    - 固定 NAS 绝对路径
    - 固定 sibling 相对路径
    pros_cons: 推荐方案可本地也可 NAS；固定路径更简单但不便移植。
    impact_risk: bootstrap 需要环境变量或默认路径。
    rollback_switch: 用户指定 NAS 路径时切换。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR081-PROCESS-LEDGER-ARCHITECTURE-REVIEW.md
  - id: DQ-CP3-CR081-02
    gate: CP3
    decision_type: architecture
    question: 本项目是否跟踪 process symlink 本身？
    recommendation: 不跟踪；.gitignore 忽略 process symlink，本项目只跟踪 bootstrap 和说明。
    alternatives:
    - 跟踪 symlink
    - 使用 submodule
    pros_cons: 推荐方案不暴露私有路径；跟踪 symlink 更直观但易断链。
    impact_risk: clone 后需运行 bootstrap。
    rollback_switch: 多人协作强依赖时改 submodule。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR081-PROCESS-LEDGER-ARCHITECTURE-REVIEW.md
  - id: DQ-CP3-CR081-03
    gate: CP3
    decision_type: implementation
    question: 过程项目是 Git 还是 NAS？
    recommendation: 推荐 Git worktree，可放 NAS 或用 NAS 备份；本项目只依赖路径。
    alternatives:
    - 仅 NAS 无 Git
    - 仅本地无 NAS
    pros_cons: Git 提供审计；NAS 提供集中存储；仅 NAS 回滚弱。
    impact_risk: 过程项目管理独立于本项目。
    rollback_switch: 用户明确只用 NAS 时保留快照要求。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR081-PROCESS-LEDGER-ARCHITECTURE-REVIEW.md
  - id: DQ-CP3-CR081-04
    gate: CP3
    decision_type: implementation
    question: 新环境如何恢复 process/？
    recommendation: 新增 LEDGER.md、ledger.yaml、scripts/link-engineering-ledger.sh。
    alternatives:
    - 手工建链接
    - 只写 README 说明
    pros_cons: 推荐方案可验证且机器可读；手工说明容易漂移。
    impact_risk: 增加少量项目文件。
    rollback_switch: 脚本不兼容时回退手工步骤。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR081-PROCESS-LEDGER-ARCHITECTURE-REVIEW.md
  - id: DQ-CP3-CR081-05
    gate: CP3
    decision_type: scope
    question: 是否同时迁移 docs/design、docs/features、docs/quality、docs/release？
    recommendation: 不迁移，先只处理 process/。
    alternatives:
    - 同时迁移所有过程性 docs
    - 只迁 docs/quality 和 docs/release
    pros_cons: 推荐方案 blast radius 小；docs 同迁会扩大验证面。
    impact_risk: docs 仍占项目仓空间。
    rollback_switch: CR081 CP8 后另起 docs externalization CR。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR081-PROCESS-LEDGER-ARCHITECTURE-REVIEW.md
  - id: DQ-CP5-CR081-01
    gate: CP5
    decision_type: implementation
    question: 三门通过后是否先执行 preflight？
    recommendation: 是；检查 process/ 类型、外部 root、tracked count、断链、脚本兼容和 dirty worktree。
    alternatives:
    - 直接执行 mirror/cutover
    - 只做手工检查
    pros_cons: 推荐方案可阻断错误路径；直接执行风险高。
    impact_risk: 可能发现需用户补路径。
    rollback_switch: preflight FAIL 时不执行 cutover。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR081-PROCESS-LEDGER-CUTOVER-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP5-CR081-02
    gate: CP5
    decision_type: implementation
    question: 是否允许 mirror process/ 到外部 ledger？
    recommendation: 允许在 preflight PASS 后用 rsync -a mirror，禁止 --delete。
    alternatives:
    - 手工复制
    - rsync --delete 保持一致
    pros_cons: 推荐方案保守且可验证；--delete 风险高。
    impact_risk: 外部 ledger 可能已有内容冲突。
    rollback_switch: 目标非空冲突时 BLOCKED。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR081-PROCESS-LEDGER-CUTOVER-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP5-CR081-03
    gate: CP5
    decision_type: implementation
    question: 是否允许本地 Git index 停止跟踪 process/**？
    recommendation: 允许执行 git rm --cached -r process，但不 commit/push。
    alternatives:
    - 不改 Git index
    - 直接 track symlink
    pros_cons: 推荐方案让 owner 单一；不改 index 会继续双写。
    impact_risk: 产生大量 staged deletion，需要单独提交确认。
    rollback_switch: 若拒绝 Git index 变更，则只做 mirror。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR081-PROCESS-LEDGER-CUTOVER-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP5-CR081-04
    gate: CP5
    decision_type: implementation
    question: 是否允许本地 process 替换为 symlink？
    recommendation: 允许在备份原目录并验证 mirror 后替换为 symlink。
    alternatives:
    - 只创建 process_external symlink
    - 不创建 symlink，只做 mirror
    pros_cons: 推荐方案实现用户目标；备选低风险但工具仍读本地 process。
    impact_risk: symlink 断链会影响 Meta Flow。
    rollback_switch: 断链时恢复 backup。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR081-PROCESS-LEDGER-CUTOVER-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP5-CR081-05
    gate: CP5
    decision_type: risk_acceptance
    question: 是否接受 cutover 后的剩余风险？
    recommendation: 接受 bootstrap、external ledger 在线和禁止 destructive symlink 操作要求。
    alternatives:
    - 先转 Spike
    - mirror-only
    pros_cons: 推荐方案可落地；Spike 更稳但延迟目标。
    impact_risk: clone 后需重建 symlink，NAS 离线会影响流程。
    rollback_switch: 验证失败或用户不接受风险时转 Spike/mirror-only。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR081-PROCESS-LEDGER-CUTOVER-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP8-CR080-01
    gate: CP8
    decision_type: risk_acceptance
    question: 是否接受 CR080 READY_WITH_RISK 并关闭当前 restore/copy 交付？
    recommendation: 接受并关闭 CR080 为 closed-current-delivery / READY_WITH_RISK。
    alternatives:
    - 保持 active 等待补充说明
    - reject 并回退到执行后待验证状态
    pros_cons: 推荐方案收敛已完成受控 copy；保持 active 会让完成项长期占用状态；reject 需要重定义验收。
    impact_risk: 接受 R-CR080-001..03。
    rollback_switch: reject 时保持 active-copy-executed-cp8-pending。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR080-DELIVERY-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP8-CR080-02
    gate: CP8
    decision_type: scope
    question: CR080 关闭范围是否只覆盖 local restore/copy 与 metadata-only verification？
    recommendation: 限定为 legacy -> target copy、metadata quick-check、账本同步和 release readiness。
    alternatives:
    - 扩大为内容级完整性证明
    - 扩大到 NAS/provider rebuild
    pros_cons: 推荐方案符合已批准边界；备选触碰未授权数据面或外部系统。
    impact_risk: 不证明内容 hash、freshness 或语义质量。
    rollback_switch: 需要内容证明时另起 content validation CR。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR080-DELIVERY-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP8-CR080-03
    gate: CP8
    decision_type: security
    question: CP8 approve 是否继续不授权内容读取、凭据、NAS/provider/lake/catalog、remote/runtime 和 cleanup？
    recommendation: 确认不授权，相关事项均需独立 CR。
    alternatives:
    - 同时授权 checksum/content read
    - 同时授权 cleanup 或旧根退役
    pros_cons: 推荐方案保持最小安全面；备选改变敏感、外部或破坏性状态。
    impact_risk: 防止数据、凭据、外部写入和交易风险。
    rollback_switch: 用户另起具体操作 CR 时切换。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR080-DELIVERY-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP8-CR080-04
    gate: CP8
    decision_type: implementation
    question: 若需要回滚或清理 target restored assets，是否必须另起 destructive cleanup / rollback CR？
    recommendation: 是；默认不删除、不移动、不覆盖 target assets，只允许 process ledger 修订。
    alternatives:
    - 在 CP8 approve 中预授权删除
    - 自动移动到隔离目录
    pros_cons: 推荐方案避免破坏性操作；备选更整洁但风险高。
    impact_risk: target reports/data 已写入，删除需额外授权。
    rollback_switch: 用户明确请求清理时另起 CR。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR080-DELIVERY-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP8-CR080-05
    gate: CP8
    decision_type: follow_up_tracking
    question: CR080 关闭后后续事项如何分流？
    recommendation: content validation、NAS compare、provider rebuild、CR077、CR078、CR046 recovery 均保留且不自动启动。
    alternatives:
    - 立即启动其中一项
    - 取消全部后续项
    pros_cons: 推荐方案保留追踪且不扩大当前范围；立即启动会开启新门禁；取消会丢失风险入口。
    impact_risk: 影响后续内容证明、旧根退役、远端治理和 runtime 恢复路径。
    rollback_switch: 用户明确要求时启动对应 CR。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP8-CR080-DELIVERY-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP2-CR080-01
    gate: CP2
    decision_type: scope
    question: 是否正式启动 CR080？
    recommendation: 启动 CR080，将 CR079-restore-candidate 转 active，并进入 CP3/CP5 门禁。
    alternatives:
    - 保持 candidate
    - 取消恢复/复制路线
    pros_cons: 推荐方案补齐 target 缺口；保持 candidate 不解决缺失。
    impact_risk: 新增正式高风险 CR。
    rollback_switch: reject 时回退为 candidate 或取消。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR080-DATA-REPORTS-RESTORE-BASELINE.md
  - id: DQ-CP2-CR080-02
    gate: CP2
    decision_type: scope
    question: 恢复/复制来源和目标是否限定为 legacy retained assets -> target authoritative root？
    recommendation: 来源限定为 /home/hyde/workspace/local_backtest/reports|data，目标限定为 /home/hyde/workspace/quant-lab/reports|data。
    alternatives:
    - 先做 NAS compare
    - 直接 provider rebuild
    pros_cons: 推荐方案外部依赖最少；NAS/provider 路径需要额外授权。
    impact_risk: legacy retained assets 不足时仍需后续 CR。
    rollback_switch: preflight 来源不足时转 NAS compare 或 provider rebuild。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR080-DATA-REPORTS-RESTORE-BASELINE.md
  - id: DQ-CP2-CR080-03
    gate: CP2
    decision_type: security
    question: CP2 是否继续禁止内容读取、样本、解析、hash 和凭据？
    recommendation: 继续禁止；只允许后续经三门批准的元数据和受控 copy。
    alternatives:
    - 同时授权内容验证
    - 同时授权凭据或 .env
    pros_cons: 推荐方案最小权限；备选可能泄露敏感数据。
    impact_risk: 内容质量暂不证明。
    rollback_switch: 需要内容验证时另起内容校验 CR。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR080-DATA-REPORTS-RESTORE-BASELINE.md
  - id: DQ-CP2-CR080-04
    gate: CP2
    decision_type: runtime_authorization
    question: CP2 approve 是否单独授权执行 restore/copy？
    recommendation: 不授权；必须 CP2/CP3/CP5 全部 approved 且 preflight PASS。
    alternatives:
    - CP2 后立即执行
    - 一次性授权所有后续访问
    pros_cons: 推荐方案符合关键门控；备选边界过宽。
    impact_risk: 避免 CP2 被误读成运行授权。
    rollback_switch: 三门批准后才进入 post-approval preflight。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR080-DATA-REPORTS-RESTORE-BASELINE.md
  - id: DQ-CP2-CR080-05
    gate: CP2
    decision_type: follow_up_tracking
    question: NAS compare、provider rebuild、CR077、CR078 是否继续保持独立候选？
    recommendation: 保持独立候选，不自动启动。
    alternatives:
    - 同时启动 NAS compare
    - 同时启动远端 Git governance 或旧根退役
    pros_cons: 推荐方案避免并行扩大影响面；备选增加外部或破坏性风险。
    impact_risk: 后续仍需用户逐项授权。
    rollback_switch: 用户明确启动对应候选时切换。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP2-CR080-DATA-REPORTS-RESTORE-BASELINE.md
  - id: DQ-CP3-CR080-01
    gate: CP3
    decision_type: architecture
    question: 是否采用本地 legacy retained assets copy-first 设计？
    recommendation: 采用本地 copy-first，先不访问 NAS/provider。
    alternatives:
    - 先做 NAS compare
    - 先做 provider rebuild
    pros_cons: 推荐方案最快补齐本地 target root；备选外部依赖和权限更多。
    impact_risk: legacy assets 不足时仍需后续候选。
    rollback_switch: preflight 来源不足时转 NAS/provider 候选。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR080-DATA-REPORTS-RESTORE-DESIGN-REVIEW.md
  - id: DQ-CP3-CR080-02
    gate: CP3
    decision_type: implementation
    question: 允许命令族是否限定为 test/mkdir/find/stat/du/rsync 且禁止 --delete / --checksum？
    recommendation: 限定上述命令族；rsync 仅本地、无 delete、无 checksum、无远端。
    alternatives:
    - 允许 cp -a
    - 允许 checksum 或 delete 同步
    pros_cons: 推荐方案可审计且降低误删/内容读取风险；备选更快但风险高。
    impact_risk: 可能无法证明内容一致性。
    rollback_switch: 需要 checksum/content validation 时另起内容校验 CR。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR080-DATA-REPORTS-RESTORE-DESIGN-REVIEW.md
  - id: DQ-CP3-CR080-03
    gate: CP3
    decision_type: security
    question: credential-like path 如何处理？
    recommendation: denylist 排除 .env*、token/secret/password/private/credential/key 等命名，证据只写脱敏计数。
    alternatives:
    - 全量复制
    - 复制后再清理
    pros_cons: 推荐方案先避免敏感复制；备选可能泄露或引入 cleanup 风险。
    impact_risk: 可能少复制少量敏感命名文件。
    rollback_switch: 用户明确确认敏感例外时另起安全门禁。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR080-DATA-REPORTS-RESTORE-DESIGN-REVIEW.md
  - id: DQ-CP3-CR080-04
    gate: CP3
    decision_type: risk_acceptance
    question: target 非空或冲突时是否 fail-closed？
    recommendation: 是，非空/冲突即 BLOCKED，不覆盖、不合并、不删除。
    alternatives:
    - 自动合并
    - 自动覆盖
    pros_cons: 推荐方案保守；备选可能破坏 target 状态。
    impact_risk: target 已有部分内容时本 CR 会停下等待决策。
    rollback_switch: 用户明确选择合并/覆盖策略后重提。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR080-DATA-REPORTS-RESTORE-DESIGN-REVIEW.md
  - id: DQ-CP3-CR080-05
    gate: CP3
    decision_type: implementation
    question: 失败/回退是否禁止自动 cleanup？
    recommendation: 是，copy 失败只记录 partial 状态，不自动删除。
    alternatives:
    - 自动删除新建目标
    - 自动移动到隔离目录
    pros_cons: 推荐方案避免破坏性操作；备选能清理但需要更高授权。
    impact_risk: 失败时可能留下 partial 目录。
    rollback_switch: cleanup 必须另起或重新授权。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP3-CR080-DATA-REPORTS-RESTORE-DESIGN-REVIEW.md
  - id: DQ-CP5-CR080-01
    gate: CP5
    decision_type: runtime_authorization
    question: approve 后是否允许执行 post-approval preflight？
    recommendation: 允许；preflight 只做元数据和状态检查，不复制。
    alternatives:
    - 不允许执行
    - 只保留 CR080 文档
    pros_cons: 推荐方案为安全执行做准备；备选无实际进展。
    impact_risk: preflight 会触碰目录元数据和 target 状态。
    rollback_switch: 用户不批准时保持 pending。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR080-DATA-REPORTS-RESTORE-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP5-CR080-02
    gate: CP5
    decision_type: runtime_authorization
    question: preflight PASS 后是否允许受控 restore/copy？
    recommendation: 允许本地 legacy -> target copy；不得内容读取、不得 delete、不得 checksum。
    alternatives:
    - 只批准 preflight
    - 改为 NAS compare
    pros_cons: 推荐方案能补齐 target；备选更保守但延迟恢复。
    impact_risk: 会向 target root 写入 reports/data。
    rollback_switch: preflight 任一失败即 BLOCKED。
    status: approved
    source: process/checkpoints/CP5-CR080-DATA-REPORTS-RESTORE-READINESS.md
  - id: DQ-CP5-CR080-03
    gate: CP5
    decision_type: security
    question: 验证证据是否限制为元数据摘要和禁止项计数？
